ubicacion: Autonomous City of Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires Province, Argentina
descripcion:
En Megatech, compañía qe brinda servicios de IT, nos encontramos en la búsqueda de "Técnicos de Soporte de Infraestructura y Comunicaciones" , para desempeñarse en un importante proyecto con cobertura en el interior del país.

Requisitos del puesto

Experiencia en posiciones de soporte de infraestructura y comunicaciones desarrollada en grandes empresas.Deseable graduados en escuelas técnicas y/o estudiantes de carreras relativas a la Ingeniería IT.Conocimientos comprobables sobre configuración de cliente de red TCP-IP para sistemas operativos Windows.Dominio de hardware, software, redes y sistemas operativos. Experiencia en elementos de networking, tanto en instalación y configuración de routers, switches, módems, access point.Deseable experiencia en trabajo en altura (max. 12 metros de elevación)Experiencia y/o conocimientos en soporte de enlaces, UPS, Telefonía, Infraestrucura PerimetralRegistro de conducir al día (excluyente) habilitado para vehículos utilitarios/camionetas.

Principales responsabilidades

Instalación y configuración de routers, switches, módems, y access point.

✅Ofrecemos

Buen clima laboralDesarrollo profesional en importante compañíaExcelentes condiciones de contratación

Modalidad de trabajo: Presencial

Jornada Full time de lunes a viernes

La duración del proyecto será de 3 meses, quien ocupe esta posición deberá tener disponibilidad para trasladarse durante el tiempo que dure el proyecto (aprox 3 meses) por todo el territorio nacional, realizando las instalaciones en los diferentes sitios establecidos, acompañado por un equipo de trabajo.

Quienes estén interesados y cumplan con los requisitos mencionados, deberán enviarnos su CV informando remuneración bruta pretendida.

¡Te esperamos!
razon_evaluacion: El rol es de instalación física de infraestructura de red (routers, switches, trabajo en altura) y requiere traslados nacionales, no se alinea con el perfil de desarrollo, testing o soporte IT técnico del candidato.

ubicacion: Ciudad Evita, Buenos Aires Province, Argentina
descripcion:
Vendor Business Associate (APU)

Acerca del rol

En TD SYNNEX buscamos un/a Vendor Business Associate para nuestro negocio de Broadcom Aggregator en la región APU (Argentina, Paraguay y Uruguay). Serás clave para gestionar la relación con el vendor y asegurar la operación diaria en precios, licencias, ventas y compras. Tu foco será mayormente administrativo (80%) con un componente comercial (20%), incluyendo actualización de listas de precios, armado de cotizaciones, manejo de documentación y coordinación con equipos internos y del vendor. Trabajarás muy cerca del BDM, brindando soporte operativo y asegurando la calidad de la información en nuestros sistemas.

Responsabilidades

Revisar y actualizar periódicamente las listas de precios provistas por el vendor, asegurando que la información esté disponible y sea precisa para los equipos internos.Coordinar con el vendor actualizaciones y cambios de precios, implementándolos de forma oportuna y documentada.Gestionar el proceso documental (versionado, revisiones, aprobaciones) relacionado con acuerdos de venta/compra y cambios de pricing.Preparar cotizaciones para clientes en base a listas de precios, condiciones vigentes y requerimientos comerciales; responder consultas de pricing con precisión y rapidez.Colaborar con el equipo de ventas/BDM para revisar y finalizar cotizaciones y propuestas.Comprender y aplicar los procesos y lineamientos de cotización específicos del vendor; mantenerte al día de cambios en políticas de precios y comunicarlos proactivamente a los equipos relevantes.Gestionar el ciclo operativo de licencias Broadcom: órdenes, renovaciones y seguimiento de entregables, cumpliendo SLA y políticas.Mantener planillas y reportes de control (ventas, forecast, pipeline, facturación APU, cumplimiento de procesos) y asegurar la higiene del CRM.Cruzar y conciliar datos entre sistemas internos y CRM, garantizando consistencia y cierres mensuales confiables.Proveer actualizaciones regulares al BDM/Product Manager sobre performance del vendor, oportunidades y riesgos.

Requisitos

1 a 3 años de experiencia en back office comercial, operaciones de ventas, pricing o gestión de licencias/renovaciones en el ecosistema de tecnología (distribuidores, resellers, vendors).Excel avanzado (tablas dinámicas, BUSCARV/VLOOKUP; Power Query/BI deseable) y manejo de grandes volúmenes de datos.Conocimientos de CRM/ERP y buenas prácticas de calidad de datos; aprendizaje rápido de nuevos sistemas y herramientas.Alta organización, atención al detalle, orientación a procesos y cumplimiento de plazos.Comunicación efectiva oral y escrita; capacidad para crear y presentar materiales de soporte simples.Trabajo colaborativo y multitarea; adaptabilidad al cambio y a momentos de mayor demanda.Ética, confidencialidad y orientación al servicio a equipos internos y canales.Inglés intermedio/avanzado para interacción con documentación y equipos del vendor.

Key Skills

At TD SYNNEX, our values guide everything we do: Together, We Own It, We Dare to Go, We Grow and Win, and above all, We Do the Right Thing. These principles shape how we work with each other, our partners, and our communities as we drive innovation and create lasting impact.

What's In It For You?

Elective Benefits: Our programs are tailored to your country to best accommodate your lifestyle.Grow Your Career: Accelerate your path to success (and keep up with the future) with formal programs on leadership and professional development, and many more on-demand courses.Elevate Your Personal Well-Being: Boost your financial, physical, and mental well-being through seminars, events, and our global Life Empowerment Assistance Program.Diversity, Equity & Inclusion: It's not just a phrase to us; valuing every voice is how we succeed. Join us in celebrating our global diversity through inclusive education, meaningful peer-to-peer conversations, and equitable growth and development opportunities.Make the Most of our Global Organization: Network with other new co-workers within your first 30 days through our onboarding program.Connect with Your Community: Participate in internal, peer-led inclusive communities and activities, including business resource groups, local volunteering events, and more environmental and social initiatives.

Don't meet every single requirement? Apply anyway. 

At TD SYNNEX, we're proud to be recognized as a great place to work and a leader in the promotion and practice of diversity, equity and inclusion. If you're excited about working for our company and believe you're a good fit for this role, we encourage you to apply. You may be exactly the person we're looking for!
razon_evaluacion: La oferta es para un rol administrativo-comercial de gestión de licencias y pricing, no es un rol técnico de desarrollo, testing o soporte IT. Requiere experiencia en back office comercial y Excel avanzado, no coincide con el perfil tecnológico del candidato.

descripcion:
Project Timeline

Start Date: Immediate Duration: 1-2 months Commitment: Part-time (15-25 hours/week, with flexibility up to 40 hours/week) | Permanent Remote 

hiring experienced Software Engineers to support high-impact research collaborations with leading AI labs. Freelancers will contribute to building training datasets that improve AI model performance on real-world client-side web development tasks.

This is a unique opportunity to apply your frontend engineering expertise toward shaping the next generation of intelligent systems.

About The Project

You'll create high-quality vibe coding data to train models on client-side web development skills—including state management, interactivity, UI correctness, and robustness. This could be in the format of games, web applications, visualizations, simulations, and more.

Key Responsibilities

Write realistic, self-contained prompts for client-side web apps, games, tools, and simulations Create precise, binary rubrics tagged by verification type Ensure all rubric items are pass/fail and verifiable from screenshot + code inspection 

Ideal Qualifications

2+ years of experience in frontend/full-stack development or technical content creation Degree in Software Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field (Bachelor's minimum; advanced degree preferred) Strong proficiency in JavaScript, TypeScript, React, or vanilla JS Comfortable writing precise technical specifications and evaluation criteria 

Application & Onboarding Process

Upload your resume AI interview: A short, 15-minute conversational session to understand your background, experience, and interest in the role Follow-up communication within a few days with next steps and onboarding details 

Apply today and leverage your frontend engineering expertise to help build the future of AI-driven systems!

We consider all qualified applicants without regard to legally protected characteristics and provide reasonable accommodations upon request.

Contract and Payment Terms

You will be engaged as an independent contractor.This is a fully remote role that can be completed on your own schedule.Projects can be extended, shortened, or concluded early depending on needs and performance.Payments are weekly on Stripe or Wise based on services rendered.
razon_evaluacion: La oferta busca un desarrollador frontend junior con JavaScript/TypeScript/React, tecnologías que coinciden con el stack del candidato. Aunque menciona modalidad presencial en Argentina, el proyecto es remoto y part-time, lo que es compatible.

titulo: Analista de Oficina Tecnica - Mar del plata
ubicacion: Mar del Plata, Buenos Aires Province, Argentina
descripcion:
En BDT Consultora seleccionamos Analista de Oficina Técnica para integrarse al equipo de una importante carpintería de aluminio de la ciudad de Mar del Plata.
¿Cuál es el objetivo del puesto?
Serás una pieza clave en la conexión entre el proyecto y la ejecución, encargándote de la interpretación técnica, el cómputo preciso de materiales y la gestión eficiente de compras para garantizar el ritmo de producción.
¿Cuáles serán tus desafíos?
• Análisis técnico: Interpretación de planos, análisis de documentación y realización de cómputos de obra.• Presupuestación: Carga de datos y elaboración de presupuestos detallados en el sistema de gestión.• Gestión de Compras: Solicitud y comparativa de cotizaciones, gestión con proveedores y seguimiento de pedidos hasta la recepción (control de remitos).• Soporte Operativo: Confección de órdenes de producción y elaboración de informes de gestión del área.
¿Qué buscamos?
• Formación: Conocimientos en Arquitectura, Diseño o Maestro Mayor de Obras (Deseable).• Herramientas IT: Manejo avanzado de AutoCAD y paquete Office (Excluyente).• Se valorará especialmente la experiencia en Winmaker o software de gestión similares.• Conocimiento en sistemas de carpintería de aluminio y procesos productivos (Deseable).• Buscamos un perfil proactivo, con marcada atención al detalle y excelentes habilidades de comunicación.Condiciones de la propuesta:
• 📍 Lugar: Mar del Plata (Presencial).• ⏰ Horario: Lunes a viernes de 08:00 a 17:00 hs.• 🚀 Oportunidad: Sumarse a una compañía en constante crecimiento.
Si deseás sumarte a una compañía en crecimiento envíanos tu cv
razon_evaluacion: La oferta es para un rol de Analista de Oficina Técnica en carpintería de aluminio, enfocado en interpretación de planos, presupuestación y gestión de compras, fuera del ámbito tecnológico (Desarrollo, Testing o Soporte IT). Requiere AutoCAD y conocimientos en arquitectura, no coincidiendo con el stack tecnológico del candidato.

titulo: Analista de aseguramiento de la calidad
descripcion:

¿Sos estudiante avanzado o graduado de carreras técnicas/universitarias y buscás desempeñarte en la industria farmacéutica? Empresa en crecimiento incorporará Analista Jr a su equipo en 📍Tandil.

🔍EL ROL:· Documentación Técnica: Redactar y revisar Procedimientos Operativos Estándar (POEs), protocolos de validación y reportes de resultados.· Gestión de Desvíos y CAPA: Colaborar en la investigación de no conformidades, análisis de causa raíz y seguimiento de acciones correctivas/preventivas.· Gestión de Validaciones y Calificaciones: Brindar soporte en la ejecución de protocolos de calificación de equipos y validación de procesos (productivos y de limpieza).· Aseguramiento del Cumplimiento: (ANMAT, Normas GMP/BPF)· Coordinación del plan de calibraciones y mantenimientos preventivos de equipamiento.

razon_evaluacion: La oferta es para un rol de aseguramiento de calidad en la industria farmacéutica, no para un rol tecnológico de desarrollo, testing o soporte IT. Requiere formación en ingeniería química y experiencia en normativas GMP/ANMAT, lo cual está fuera del perfil del candidato.

ubicacion: Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires Province, Argentina
descripcion:
¡Sumate a nuestro equipo y descubrí un desafío único en una compañía apasionada por lo que hace! 🚀

Si estás buscando una oportunidad para desarrollarte en una empresa con un excelente clima laboral, donde tu crecimiento y bienestar son nuestra prioridad, ¡este es tu lugar! ✨

Estamos en la búsqueda de un/a Pasante de Help Desk para unirse a nuestro equipo de Soporte IT.

¿Quiénes somos? 

Somos una empresa multinacional líder en soluciones y servicios tecnológicos que potencian la agilidad y competitividad de nuestros clientes. Nuestro compromiso es hacer una diferencia real en sus procesos de negocio y en sus resultados.

¿Qué necesitamos? 

Estudiantes de las carreras de Lic. en Informática, Ingeniería en Sistemas o afines.Manejo de Paquete Office y Excel (nivel intermedio).Deseable: Cursos en redes y reparación de hardware.Buscamos que seas metódico, organizado y con facilidad en la autogestión. Suma tener iniciativa e innovación, proactividad y vocación por el trabajo en equipo.

¿Cuáles van a ser algunas de tus responsabilidades? 

Brindar soporte técnico a usuarios internos en Windows 10/11, Office 365, VPN y SAP.Gestionar incidentes y requerimientos a través de nuestra herramienta de tickets (registro, seguimiento y resolución).Colaborar en la administración de Active Directory, Azure AD y Google Workspace.Gestionar el inventario de hardware, asegurando la entrega y retiro de equipos a los colaboradores.Dar soporte en la gestión de la flota de telefonía móvil y equipos corporativos.Realizar el mantenimiento y gestión de altas/bajas de usuarios en los sistemas del área.

Beneficios que ofrecemos 🎁

🏥 Medicina prepaga para vos y tu grupo familiar.

📅 5 días libres extra a las licencias habituales.

✈️ 4 semanas al año para trabajar desde cualquier parte del mundo (Work from Anywhere).

🏠 Posibilidad de Home Office y trabajo presencial.

🎁 Kit de bienvenida para que comiences con todo.

💰 Programa de referidos con recompensas.

🕒 Flex Time.

🎓 Capacitaciones y certificaciones técnicas a cargo de la empresa.

🧘 Cursos de salud y bienestar: RCP, nutrición, chequeo médico integral, y más.

🍼 Regalos especiales por nacimiento, paternidad extendida y reducción de jornada para madres.

📉 Descuentos en la Universidad UCEMA y en múltiples servicios (telefonía, idiomas, alimentos).

En SEIDOR, creemos en el talento y en la igualdad de oportunidades. Valoramos la diversidad y la inclusión, promoviendo un entorno donde cada persona pueda desarrollar su máximo potencial. Todas nuestras oportunidades laborales están abiertas a personas de cualquier edad, género, etnia, religión, orientación sexual, condición socioeconómica, discapacidad o cualquier otra condición protegida por la ley. Nos comprometemos a construir juntos un futuro basado en el respeto, la colaboración y la innovación, porque sabemos que nuestras diferencias nos hacen más fuertes y nos permiten crecer como equipo y como organización. ¿Te sumás?

titulo: Fullstack developer - React and Node Remote
descripcion:
🖥 Hi,We are developing an online software 📱 💻 with some developers already working for us remote, whilst our main office is in Europe.
We need a few more persons to work with it on a freelance basis.

descripcion:
En AKRIBIS, la exactitud, la eficiencia y la escalabilidad son la base de nuestra operación. Buscamos un/a Analista de Operaciones de T.I. con visión global y criterio técnico, capaz de sostener el funcionamiento diario de nuestras herramientas y, a la vez, impulsar mejoras que hagan el trabajo más simple, rápido y confiable para toda la organización.

Esta posición pertenece a la división Operaciones de T.I., responsable de mantener en estado operacional las plataformas del Grupo, resolver incidentes, administrar accesos, y asegurar continuidad de servicio con proveedores y áreas internas.

Modalidad y lugar de trabajo

Full Time – Jornada habitual de lunes a viernesModalidad: PresencialUbicación: Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires – Barrio Montserrat

Tu misiónAsegurar que las herramientas y recursos tecnológicos de la empresa funcionen correctamente, con continuidad, orden y trazabilidad; y que las personas puedan trabajar con claridad y soporte, mediante procesos, inventario, control de accesos y atención de tickets.

Responsabilidades principales

Operación y continuidad

Monitorear el estado operativo de herramientas y servicios (plataformas internas, cuentas, licencias, accesos).Gestionar proveedores: revisar saldos/renovaciones para evitar cortes de servicio y coordinar altas/bajas de licencias.Cargar facturas y documentación del área al sector contable, con seguimiento y orden administrativo.

Gestión de usuarios y accesos

Procesar altas y bajas del personal: aprovisionamiento/desaprovisionamiento de cuentas.Administrar accesos, permisos y perfiles en plataformas (según roles y necesidades).Mantener criterios de seguridad básicos: mínimos privilegios, orden y trazabilidad.

Inventario y herramientas de trabajo

Administrar computadoras, celulares y periféricos.Mantener un inventario actualizado (asignación, estado, garantías, reposición).Anticipar y solicitar compras necesarias a tiempo, coordinando con las áreas involucradas.

Soporte y tickets

Atender consultas e incidentes mediante un sistema de tickets (priorización, seguimiento, cierre y documentación).Guiar a los usuarios en el uso correcto y eficiente de las herramientas disponibles.

Mejora continua y automatización

Detectar oportunidades de mejora en procesos operativos y proponer soluciones.Buscar y/o desarrollar automatizaciones simples que reduzcan tareas manuales y errores (scripts, integraciones livianas, mejoras de flujos).

Requisitos

Experiencia en operaciones de TI / soporte interno (help desk, IT ops, sysadmin junior o roles similares).Conocimientos prácticos en:Gestión de usuarios, permisos y accesos (en suites y/o plataformas empresariales).Gestión de inventario de hardware y ciclo de vida (alta, asignación, reposición).Atención por tickets y manejo de prioridades (SLA básico, categorización, documentación).Perfil ordenado y metódico para tareas administrativas (facturas, proveedores, renovaciones).Excelentes habilidades de comunicación: explicar con claridad y paciencia, sin tecnicismos innecesarios.

Se valora

Experiencia con suites tipo Google Workspace / Microsoft 365, CRMs/ERPs, y herramientas SaaS corporativas.Nociones de seguridad (MFA, políticas de acceso, buenas prácticas).Automatización: Google Apps Script / PowerShell / Bash / Python (aunque sea básico).Experiencia generando documentación interna (how-to, base de conocimientos).Mentalidad de mejora continua: capacidad de convertir problemas repetitivos en procesos y soluciones.

Competencias clave

Proactividad y ownership: ver el problema, tomarlo, cerrarlo.Priorización y criterio: distinguir urgencia vs. importancia.Orientación al servicio: foco en destrabar y habilitar el trabajo de otros.Rigurosidad operativa: orden, seguimiento, control y registro.
razon_evaluacion: La oferta es para un rol de Soporte IT/Operaciones TI junior en CABA, alineado con la experiencia del candidato en soporte de primer nivel. Aunque no requiere desarrollo activo, valora nociones de automatización (scripts) que coinciden parcialmente con el stack técnico.

descripcion:
En Megatech, compañía que brinda servicios de IT, nos encontramos en la búsqueda de "Técnicos de Soporte de Infraestructura y Comunicaciones" , para desempeñarse en un importante proyecto con cobertura en el interior del país.

Requisitos del puesto

Experiencia en posiciones de soporte de infraestructura y comunicaciones desarrollada en grandes empresas.Deseable graduados en escuelas técnicas y/o estudiantes de carreras relativas a la Ingeniería IT.Conocimientos comprobables sobre configuración de cliente de red TCP-IP para sistemas operativos Windows.Dominio de hardware, software, redes y sistemas operativos. Experiencia en elementos de networking, tanto en instalación y configuración de routers, switches, módems, access point.Deseable experiencia en trabajo en altura (max. 12 metros de elevación)Experiencia y/o conocimientos en soporte de enlaces, UPS, Telefonía, Infraestrucura PerimetralRegistro de conducir al día (excluyente) habilitado para vehículos utilitarios/camionetas.

Principales responsabilidades

Instalación y configuración de routers, switches, módems, y access point.

✅Ofrecemos

Buen clima laboralDesarrollo profesional en importante compañíaExcelentes condiciones de contratación

Modalidad de trabajo: Presencial

Jornada Full time de lunes a viernes

La duración del proyecto será de 3 meses, quien ocupe esta posición deberá tener disponibilidad para trasladarse durante el tiempo que dure el proyecto (aprox 3 meses) por todo el territorio nacional, realizando las instalaciones en los diferentes sitios establecidos, acompañado por un equipo de trabajo.

Contará con todos los gastos pagos (alojamiento, viáticos, refrigerio)

Quienes estén interesados y cumplan con los requisitos mencionados, deberán enviarnos su CV informando remuneración bruta pretendida.

¡Te esperamos!
razon_evaluacion: El rol es de soporte de infraestructura física y redes, enfocado en instalación y configuración de hardware de red en campo, con requisitos excluyentes como registro de conducir y disponibilidad para viajar por el país. No se alinea con el perfil de desarrollo de software, testing o soporte IT funcional del candidato.

descripcion:
Job Overview

As a full-stack engineer at Tempo, you will play a pivotal role. Your focus will be on developing intuitive, high-performance web applications within our AI-powered visual IDE. You'll collaborate with a cross-functional team, contributing your technical expertise to create seamless experiences for designers and developers.

Key Responsibilities

Design and implement robust front-end solutions for our visual IDE, optimizing for performance and scalability. Work closely with UX/UI designers to translate design concepts into functional code. Contribute to the development lifecycle, including coding, testing, debugging, and deployment. Build and maintain backend capabilities in TypeScript, including Supabase (database, auth, storage) and Supabase Edge Functions for serverless logic and integrations. Create, version, and document APIs (REST and/or RPC) with clear specifications using OpenAPI/Swagger, ensuring strong developer experience and maintainability. Contribute to the full development lifecycle, including coding, testing, debugging, and deployment across both frontend and backend. Ensure high-quality graphic standards and brand consistency. Stay updated with emerging front-end technologies and methodologies, integrating them to enhance our platform's capabilities. Maintain an online presence between the hours of 9am - 4pm EST

Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field — or equivalent practical experience. 2+ years experience as a full-stack developer (startup/product experience preferred). Strong proficiency in TypeScript and modern React development (HTML/CSS/JS fundamentals). Experience with Tailwind CSS and building responsive, adaptive interfaces. Working experience with Sadupabase (Postgres/Auth/Storage) and Supabase Edge Functions. Experience building and documenting APIs, including using OpenAPI/Swagger (or similar). Strong problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and comfort shipping production code. Clear communicator and collaborative teammate who works well with designers, PMs, and engineers. Fluent in English (written and spoken). 

What we offer

The opportunity to be part of an innovative, fast-growing startup. A collaborative, flexible, and supportive work environment where your contributions directly impact the product's success. Starting salary of $40,000 USD with the opportunity to increase to $60,000 USD
razon_evaluacion: La oferta busca un desarrollador full-stack con TypeScript y React, tecnologías dentro del stack del candidato, y es remota, lo que elimina barreras de ubicación. Se penaliza levemente por requerir 2+ años de experiencia, pero el perfil junior y el stack coinciden.

descripcion:
Summary:Konexial is looking for a skilled backend developer who is excited about working within Swift’s Vapor framework. While experience with Vapor is a huge plus, we’re open to candidates with a strong backend development background in other languages or frameworks and a willingness to learn ours. Frontend experience with React is also a plus, as you’ll collaborate closely with our frontend team.
Your future job responsibilities include: Server-side development.Optimize database queries.Create and maintain software documentation.Integrate third party APIs to our system.Scale our solutions.Design robust APIs to support mobile and desktop clients
Minimum requirements for the role:Server-side development knowledge.Proficiency writing SQL and working with databases (PSQL).Experience with design and implementation of APIs.Strong english communication skills.Optimize web applications for performance and scalability
An ideal candidate also has the following characteristics: Attention to detailHumilityInitiativePersistenceSystems/Process OrientationAnalytical Problem SolvingTolerance of AmbiguityCommitment to TaskCommunicationSense of Urgency 
We’d be thrilled if you also know:VaporSwiftMobile developmentFrontend developmentAWS / EBSAdvanced SQLData optimization
Company Description
Konexial is not your typical software company. With a mission to debunk the traditional methods of transportation software development, we have created a solution that makes the big players in enterprise software curse our name. Our comprehensive platform provides an alternative for everyone who has lived the nightmare of failed implementations, broken promises, and clunky software. 
Fellow adventure seekers: Embrace your desire to be different and join us in our quest for simplicity. As crazy as it might sound, we have a deep and abiding passion for taking the complexity our clients face every day and breaking it down to the simplest possible solution. To learn more about Konexial’s software please visit us at www.Konexial.com.

descripcion:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Front-End Web Developer in Argentina.

This role offers the opportunity to design and build dynamic, user-friendly web interfaces that bridge the gap between visual design and functional implementation. The Front-End Developer will work on both public-facing websites and internal tools, contributing to a wide range of projects in a remote-first, globally distributed environment. This position emphasizes collaboration with designers, developers, and stakeholders to deliver seamless, high-performance applications using frameworks like React and Angular. You will be involved in translating wireframes into reusable, maintainable code, optimizing performance, and ensuring a consistent and engaging user experience. The role provides autonomy, creative input, and exposure to evolving architectures in a culture focused on innovation, quality, and continuous learning.

Accountabilities

Develop new user-facing features and translate design wireframes into functional, visually appealing codeBuild reusable components and ensure code quality, maintainability, and scalability across projectsCollaborate closely with designers, developers, and other teams to bridge design and technical implementationOptimize application performance, ensuring fast, responsive, and consistent user experiencesSupport internal UI tools and back-office interfaces to improve operational workflowsContribute to website optimization, SEO adherence, and technical best practices for front-end developmentMaintain alignment with evolving architectural standards and development frameworks

Requirements

Proven experience with modern front-end frameworks, especially React and AngularStrong skills in JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML, CSS, and Tailwind, with solid understanding of SPA, SSG, and asynchronous request handlingExperience with server-side CSS pre-processing and code versioning tools such as GitHubFamiliarity with UI/UX principles, responsive design, and cross-browser compatibilityExperience with automated testing frameworks like Cypress or Playwright is a plusStrong communication skills and ability to collaborate in a remote, distributed teamDedicated workspace and reliable high-speed internet connectionOptional: familiarity with Figma, Lokalise, and front-end security best practices

Benefits

Fully remote, work-from-anywhere position with flexible schedule and PTO planOpportunity to shape impactful web experiences that reach global usersProfessional development budget for conferences, courses, and learning resourcesCollaborative, high-performance, globally distributed team environmentEmphasis on work-life balance and autonomy in day-to-day responsibilitiesExposure to cutting-edge front-end technologies and evolving web architectures

Why Apply Through Jobgether?

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.

We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

 Why Apply Through Jobgether?

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

descripcion:
¡Súmate al equipo de Lara AI!

En Lara AI , parte del Grupo Visma , estamos revolucionando la experiencia del empleado. Somos un agente de inteligencia artificial integrado en los equipos de RRHH que asiste a los colaboradores 24/7, automatizando procesos críticos como onboarding y gestión de desempeño a través de canales como WhatsApp. Nuestra misión es escalar la calidad humana mediante tecnología de vanguardia.

🚀 Misión del Rol

Tu misión como Frontend Developer será ser parte de la evolución de nuestra interfaz, garantizando experiencias de usuario fluidas y de alto impacto. Tu propósito es conectar la tecnología con las personas y co-crear soluciones que impacten en todo el negocio , asegurando que cada línea de código potencie la interacción entre nuestra IA y miles de usuarios.

💼 Desafíos Técnicos

 Evolución del Producto: Diseñar y desarrollar funcionalidades de punta a punta, garantizando una arquitectura frontend escalable y moderna. Stack: Implementar soluciones robustas utilizando React , TypeScript y optimizando el despliegue sobre Vercel . Calidad y Performance: Testear y monitorear despliegues para asegurar que las nuevas features mantengan la estabilidad de un entorno de misión crítica. AI-Driven Development: Integrar herramientas de IA (Copilot, Cursor) en tu flujo diario para multiplicar la capacidad de entrega y calidad técnica.


🧠 Requisitos y Skills

 Excluyente: Experiencia sólida (+2 años) desarrollando con React y TypeScript . Deseable: Dominio de ecosistemas de despliegue (Vercel) y gestión de estados. AI Mindset: Buscamos un perfil con mentalidad de experimentación constante, que utilice la IA como un multiplicador de talento para probar nuevas librerías y optimizar procesos. Soft Skills: Perfil inquieto y curioso, con gran capacidad de investigación autónoma y comunicación asertiva para trabajar en células ágiles.


📍 Ubicación y Esquema

 Modalidad: Híbrido / Remoto (Contamos con oficinas en AMBA).


🎁 Benefícios Visma

 Flexibilidad: Esquema de trabajo dinámico que equilibra la vida personal y profesional. MyDays & Visma Day: Días adicionales de descanso para recargar energías. Crecimiento: Entorno de aprendizaje continuo en una corporación global con ADN de startup.


¡Si te apasionan los desafíos y la tecnología, te invitamos a sumarte a Lara AI y ser parte de esta transformación!

_\#BetterTogether_

descripcion:
We're looking for a Junior Developer to join our multicultural team and be part of the full development cycle of web and mobile apps: including understanding business needs, designing solutions for specific problems, and developing the product. They should demonstrate a willingness to learn new things from other team members and best practices around them, and collaborate with different roles to achieve the best results. The goal is to develop high-quality software, providing value aligned with our client's business needs and our high standards.

This position is open to candidates currently living in Montevideo or Buenos Aires (CABA).

What are the main responsibilities of this role?

Develop high-quality code, which is well-designed and testable, supported by more experienced developers.Active participation and collaboration with the team to achieve the project goals. For example, by actively participating in instances of the project like planning and review calls, maintenance of artifacts used in the project, etc.Write meaningful code reviews.Execute the right level of documentation for the project, for example, readme, API documentation.Collaborate with internal initiatives.

Which skills and experience do we envision for this role?

+1 year of experience in the IT field.Software experience from degree studies.Experience with Node.js to build RESTful APIs, preferably using frameworks such as Express or NestJS.Understanding of relational and non-relational databases (e.g., PostgreSQL, MongoDB).Basic knowledge of SQL queries, data modeling concepts, and asynchronous programming (Promises, async/await).Intermediate knowledge of design patterns and most used architectures.Experience with Git and version control workflows.Intermediate to advanced English skills.Ability to communicate with different stakeholders: team, client, managers.Experience working in Agile environments using methodologies such as Scrum, including estimation techniques, collaborating on user story writing, and defining acceptance criteria.Experience with AI development tools such as Cursor, GitHub Copilot,Codex or Claude.

Join Our Team And Enjoy

Access to Rootstrap University, Conferences/Certifications, and a Mentorship Program for your professional growth.Learning Bonus.Opportunities to organize cross-functional initiatives and receive 360 Feedback to improve your skills continuously.The flexibility to work remotely or from our offices in Montevideo or Buenos Aires with a flexible schedule and a Workation program available after the first year with the company. During the first year, we encourage a hybrid work dynamic to support onboarding, collaboration, and continuous guidance as you grow into the role.Gym benefits, psychological counseling, and weekly lunch reimbursements with special foods in the offices.An Onboarding kit and access to cutting-edge technologies and tools to make your work easier.Referrals program bonuses, After offices, Prizes, and special occasion gifts to celebrate your achievements.People Care referent to support your well-being and personal development.

We value your well-being and happiness. We grow together!

How We Work

We offer a flexible and diverse work environment that fosters multicultural talentWe value autonomy and creativity. We want people to bring ideas to the table and to think as leaders.We put our focus on real human connections.We have a commitment to excellence.

At Rootstrap, we help companies launch, grow, and scale their digital products and services. With over 290 global team members, we’ve built products for clients like MasterClass, Universal, Google, as well as innovative startups and inspired pioneers. Earning regular recognition with Fastest Growing Company & Best B2B Service Provider Industry accolades, our team prides itself on making an impact that transcends our efforts. We have offices in Uruguay, Argentina, and Colombia, providing the flexibility to work remotely. Know more about life at Rootstrap visiting https://www.rootstrap.com/careers .

We embrace an AI-first mindset, continuously exploring how artificial intelligence can enhance the way we build products, solve problems, and deliver value. Across all stages of the development process, we encourage our teams to actively leverage AI to boost productivity and drive innovation.

All of our candidate searches are covered under Uruguayan Law 19691 (the purpose of this law is to promote the inclusion of people with disabilities).

As part of our Security and Compliance process, all seniority levels and roles must follow the company’s information security policies and secure development practices, and promptly report any suspected security incidents or vulnerabilities.

descripcion:
Who We Are

At Kyndryl, we design, build, manage and modernize the mission-critical technology systems that the world depends on every day. So why work at Kyndryl? We are always moving forward – always pushing ourselves to go further in our efforts to build a more equitable, inclusive world for our employees, our customers and our communities.

The Role

Are you ready to build the backbone of modern applications?

We are looking for a Junior Backend Developer to join our team and contribute to impactful projects that require strong technical foundations and collaborative spirit.

In this role, you will:

Develop and maintain backend services and RESTful APIs using Python or Node.js (TypeScript). Work with Docker for containerization and implement basic logging/error handling. Interact with relational databases (e.g., PostgreSQL/MySQL) and at least one NoSQL store (e.g., MongoDB/DynamoDB) at a basic level. Collaborate with frontend developers, architects, and product teams to deliver scalable and secure solutions using Git and agile practices. Support active projects where backend integration is critical to delivery success. 

Your Future at Kyndryl

Every position at Kyndryl offers a way forward to grow your career. We have opportunities that you won’t find anywhere else, including hands-on experience, learning opportunities, and the chance to certify in all four major platforms. Whether you want to broaden your knowledge base or narrow your scope and specialize in a specific sector, you can find your opportunity here.

Who You Are

You’re good at what you do and possess the required experience to provide it. However, equally as important – you have a growth mindset; keen to drive your own personal and professional development. You are customer-focused – someone who prioritizes customer success in your work. And finally, you’re open and borderless – naturally inclusive in how you work with others.

Who You Are

Required Skills

Up to 3 years of experience in backend development. Proficiency in Python or Node.js with TypeScript; building RESTful services. Basic data modeling with a relational DB and familiarity with a NoSQL database. Docker fundamentals (build, run, compose) and Git usage. Currently studying or graduated from a systems-related field (exceptions may be considered). Strong collaboration and communication skills. 

Preferred Skills 

Exposure to cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) and simple CI/CD. Introductory experience in GenAI (e.g., LangChain/LangGraph) and awareness of Bedrock, Vertex AI, or Azure OpenAI. Familiarity with agile methodologies (e.g., Scrum). Ability to interact with clients and stakeholders (customer-facing mindset). 

Being You

Diversity is a whole lot more than what we look like or where we come from, it’s how we think and who we are. We welcome people of all cultures, backgrounds, and experiences. But we’re not doing it single-handily: Our Kyndryl Inclusion Networks are only one of many ways we create a workplace where all Kyndryls can find and provide support and advice. This dedication to welcoming everyone into our company means that Kyndryl gives you – and everyone next to you – the ability to bring your whole self to work, individually and collectively, and support the activation of our equitable culture. That’s the Kyndryl Way.

What You Can Expect

With state-of-the-art resources and Fortune 100 clients, every day is an opportunity to innovate, build new capabilities, new relationships, new processes, and new value. Kyndryl cares about your well-being and prides itself on offering benefits that give you choice, reflect the diversity of our employees and support you and your family through the moments that matter – wherever you are in your life journey. Our employee learning programs give you access to the best learning in the industry to receive certifications, including Microsoft, Google, Amazon, Skillsoft, and many more. Through our company-wide volunteering and giving platform, you can donate, start fundraisers, volunteer, and search over 2 million non-profit organizations. At Kyndryl, we invest heavily in you, we want you to succeed so that together, we will all succeed.

Get Referred!

If you know someone that works at Kyndryl, when asked ‘How Did You Hear About Us’ during the application process, select ‘Employee Referral’ and enter your contact's Kyndryl email address.

descripcion:
The salary range for this role is $1,500 - $4,000 per month (Gross in USD) 

About Sezzle:

With a mission to financially empower the next generation, Sezzle is revolutionizing the shopping experience beyond payments, blending cutting-edge tech with seamless, interest-free installment plans that make shopping smarter and more accessible. We’re not just transforming payments; we’re redefining how people discover, interact with, and purchase the things they love while driving real impact on merchant sales through increased conversions and higher order values. As we continue to shape the future of fintech and retail, we’re building an innovative, dynamic team passionate about creating more than just a transaction but a truly unique shopping journey. If you’re excited about pushing boundaries in tech and delivering a game-changing experience for consumers and merchants alike, come join us at Sezzle and help create the future of shopping!

About the Role:

We are seeking a talented and motivated Junior Software Engineer with a unique blend of accounting experience  who is best in class with a high IQ plus a high EQ. This role presents an exciting opportunity to thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced environment within a rapidly growing team, with abundant prospects for career advancement. This role is tailored for professionals who started their careers in accounting but pivoted to engineering and now want to leverage their domain expertise to solve technical challenges in fintech. This role presents an exciting opportunity to thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced environment within a rapidly growing team, with abundant prospects for career advancement. The Junior Software Engineer will assist us with the design, development, and installation of software solutions. Your duties will include development, writing code, and documenting functionality. You should be able to build high-quality, innovative and fully performing software in compliance with coding standards and technical design.

Interview Process

We believe transparency is important at Sezzle. Regularly providing feedback while setting expectations is part of our culture starting with the interview process. Advancement through each step is not guaranteed.

Application submitted (you are here)Wonderlic test (30-40 min)Coding assessment (:1.5 hours)Interview with recruiters (30 min)Interview with engineers (1 hour)Interview with engineering leadership (30-45 min)Offer

Sezzle Technical Stack:

Golang backend, React / React Native front-endGrafana / Loki / Prometheus metricsKubernetesAWSAmazon Aurora (MySQL) RDSGitlab CI/CD deploymentsUnit, Integration, and end-to-end testing

What You'll Do:

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to enhance and maintain software solutions for financial processes.Be an integral part of the software development lifecycle.Work as an integrated team member developing new features.Leverage accounting background to identify gaps and improve automation and reconciliation workflows.Evaluate and deploy software tools, processes, and metrics.Provide support and consulting on software systems usage.Ensure compliance with project plans and industry standards.

What We Look For:

Prior experience as an accountant or financial analyst.Solid understanding of financial operations such as reconciliation, reporting, and compliance.Proficient in at least one programming language (e.g., Python, Java, Go) and familiar with database systems like MySQL or PostgreSQL.Experience with backend API development.Experience with relational database storage and retrieval.Familiarity with software engineering tools, software development methodology, and release processes.Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Computer Science, or a related field.

Sezzle’s Technology Stack:

Languages: Golang, Typescript, PythonFrontend: Typescript - React and React NativeBackend: GolangDatabase: MySQL, Postgres, ElasticsearchDevOps & Cloud: AWS, KubernetesVersion Control: GitCI/CD: GitlabTesting: Developer-driven, focus on automated unit, integration, and end-to-end testsSezzle is focused on using open source, and we build what we can before buying!

About You:

You have relentlessly high standards - many people may think your standards are unreasonably high. You are continually raising the bar and driving those around you to deliver great results. You make sure that defects do not get sent down the line and that problems are fixed so they stay fixed.You’re not bound by convention - your success—and much of the fun—lies in developing new ways to do thingsYou need action - speed matters in business. Many decisions and actions are reversible and do not need extensive study. We value calculated risk-taking.You earn trust - you listen attentively, speak candidly, and treat others respectfully.You have backbone; disagree, then commit - you can respectfully challenge decisions when you disagree, even when doing so is uncomfortable or exhausting. You have conviction and are tenacious. You do not compromise for the sake of social cohesion. Once a decision is determined, you commit wholly.You deliver results - you focus on the key inputs and deliver them with the right quality and in a timely fashion. Despite setbacks, you rise to the occasion and never settle.

What Makes Working at Sezzle Awesome:

At Sezzle, we are more than just brilliant engineers, passionate data enthusiasts, out-of-the-box thinkers, and determined innovators. We believe in surrounding ourselves with only the best and the brightest individuals. Our culture is not defined by a certain set of perks designed to give the illusion of the traditional startup culture, but rather, it is the visible example living in every employee that we hire.

descripcion:
Who We Are

MixRank processes petabytes of data every month from web crawling. We have hundreds of customers using our data products including Google, Amazon, Facebook, Intel, and Adobe, across industries Sales, Marketing, Finance, and Security.

Team is 58+ full-time, full-remote from 20+ countries. We're growing, profitable, employee-owned, no dependence on outside funding. Applicants from all geographies and backgrounds are welcome.

We are looking for passionate individuals for whom programming is not just a job but it’s something they love to do. We're obsessed with computers, programming, big data, databases, compilers, hardware, math, data science, and the internet. Does this sound like you? Please apply to join our team.

Our code base is very friendly to new contributors. You'll have a fully-functional development environment within hours (fully automated) and be pushing commits on your first day. Deployments to production happen multiple times per day and finish in less than 2 minutes. Effectively all of our codebase is written in Python, Rust, SQL, Javascript/TypeScript, and Nix. The core technologies you'll need familiarity with to be productive are Python, PostgreSQL, Linux, and Git. We care more about the candidate as a person than the specific technology experience.

We operate at a larger scale than typical startups. We operate two datacenters with high performance servers we've built that are capable of dealing with the volumes of data we process. We've implemented our own distributed file system. We do full-scale web crawls. We download and perform static analysis on the entire universe of Android APKs and iOS IPAs that are published. Unlike a typical startup where you'll spend half of your time in meetings, and the other half fixing bugs from Jira tickets— at MixRank you'll get to challenge yourself with difficult technical problems that will help you to grow as an individual.

Who We’re Looking For

We're hiring generalist software engineers to work on web applications, data mining, machine learning/data science, data transformation/ETL, data modeling, database scaling, infrastructure, devops, and more. We'll cater the role to whatever subset of these areas match your interests.

Beneficial experience includes PostgreSQL, Python, Rust, Linux, TypeScript, Nix, frontend/backend web development, and data mining.

Please include your updated resume when applying for this role.
razon_evaluacion: Match positivo para rol junior remoto en Argentina. La oferta valora JavaScript/TypeScript, PostgreSQL y Git (parte de tu stack), y busca generalistas con mentalidad de crecimiento. Se penaliza porque Python y Rust son tecnologías principales no presentes en tu experiencia actual.

Qualities

You take pride in delivering world-class, intuitive, easy-to-use software.You understand that simple is better than complicated (but also know this is more challenging to achieve).You are detail-oriented. You dot your "i's" and cross your "t's".You enjoy challenges and are persistent in tackling them. You know when to ask for help.

Competitive salaryAnnual offsite team tripLearn from a very high performing teamTraining from US mentors

descripcion:
We are seeking a Quality Assurance Engineer to join a fast-paced team focused on mobile game quality. This role combines programming in C# (preferred) or Java with hands-on experience in Unity and mobile platforms. You’ll design and run automated tests across a device farm to ensure our games perform seamlessly on iOS and Android. This is a highly collaborative role where curiosity, detective work, and strong debugging skills are key to success.

What You’ll Do

Develop and maintain automated tests for Unity-based mobile applications using C# or Java.Execute tests across a device farm (iOS and Android phones/tablets), manage devices, and analyze results.Run automated testing through Unity Test Runner and monitor results across both Android and iOS devices.Apply visual testing approaches and blueprint-driven test flows to validate gameplay and UI.Debug, troubleshoot, and partner with other teams to resolve failures and uncover root causes.Integrate automated tests into CI/CD pipelines such as Jenkins or Azure DevOps.

What We’re Looking For

Strong programming skills in C# (preferred) or Java, with experience in Unity.Hands-on mobile testing experience, ideally across both iOS and Android.Familiarity with device farms (AWS Device Farm, Kobiton, or similar).Ability to apply detective-style problem solving to investigate issues and drive them to resolution.Excellent communication and collaboration skills in a fast-paced team environment.

It Is An Asset If You Have

Experience with Kobiton or transitioning test infrastructure between farms.Knowledge of Android (adb) and iOS/Xcode tooling.Exposure to visual programming like Unreal Engine BlueprintsExperience with CI/CD tools like Jenkins or Azure DevOps.

Why Join Us

You’ll play a key role in ensuring world-class mobile game quality at Microsoft, working on real devices across diverse platforms. If you love programming, mobile technology, and detective-style debugging, this role offers the chance to make a direct impact on the player experience.

Since 2005, Perform's engineers have been helping companies scale their apps and their teams. We were near-shoring before it was even a term and have worked with 100s of clients along the way.
razon_evaluacion: La oferta es para QA Engineer junior en la industria de videojuegos, requiere C# (tecnología del candidato) y experiencia en Unity, alineándose con su perfil de testing y desarrollo.

descripcion:
The Data Quality Assurance Analyst works closely with business partners and the development team to ensure applications meet business requirements and are free of major defects. This role is responsible for test case creation & execution, defect lifecycle management, reporting status, and utilize test automation.

Primary Job Accountabilities/Responsibilities

Work closely with business partners in understanding user needs, project scope, and deliverablesManage different phases of testing as needed (unit, functional, integration, user acceptance, regression, and performance/load)Innovate solutions to problems while following established processes. Senior teammates are still needed to provide oversight on solutions to complex problems.

Quality Assurance

Create and execute test cases according to test approach; Obtain or create test data as needed; Obtain business approval for test results; Provide daily updatesContribute to all agile/scrum ritualsContribute to the improvement of the testing processProvide test cases for User Acceptance Testing (UAT) or regression as neededWork with UAT on reported issuesDevelop ad hoc queries and reports based on the needs of the business and technical teamsManage defects reported in production and during the QA testing phase against requirements and system standardsParticipate in team defect reviews, provide root cause where possibleLeverage test automationMentor and train testers on test tools & process

Data Quality

Develop, test, code review, and implement data quality rules for applicable data quality dimensions (accuracy, completeness, validity, consistency, uniqueness, timeliness, integrity, and reasonability)Leverage the existing data quality frameworkReview and optimize SQL codeMay be allocated 25% to Business Analyst activities including gathering and clarifying requirements

R/Scala/C++/Java helpfulExperience with API testing, Prompt EngineeringExperience with Azure Databricks/DevOpsKnowledge of Data Lake, Data Lakehouse, Data PipelinesFamiliar with MS Fabric, Unity Catalog, medallion lakehouse architectureLead experienceExperience with Business Analyst role

Helping People Thrive in a Connected World

Connect with us. Bring us your best work and your brightest ideas. And we’ll bring you a place where you can thrive. Learn more at jobs.assurant.com.

What’s the culture like at Assurant?

Our unique culture is a big reason why talented people choose Assurant. Named a Best/Great Place to Work in 15 countries and awarded the Fortune America’s Most Innovative Companies recognition, we bring together top talent around the world. Although we have a wide variety of skills and experiences, we share common characteristics that are uniquely Assurant. A passion for service. An ability to innovate in practical ways. And a willingness to take chances. We call our culture The Assurant Way.

Company Overview

Assurant is a leading global business services company that supports, protects, and connects major consumer purchases. A Fortune 500 company with a presence in 21 countries, Assurant supports the advancement of the connected world by partnering with the world’s leading brands to develop innovative solutions and deliver an enhanced customer experience through mobile device solutions, extended service contracts, vehicle protection services, renters insurance, lender-placed insurance products, and other specialty products.

Equal Opportunity Statement

Assurant is an Equal Employment Opportunity employer and does not use or consider race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local law in employment decisions.

Job Scam Alert

Please be aware that during Assurant's application process, we will never ask for personal information such as your Social Security number, bank account details, or passwords. Learn more about what to look out for and how to report a scam here.

descripcion:
About Canals

Canals is a fully remote, profitable startup transforming the industrial supply chain ($10T industry) with AI. Our platform seamlessly integrates with the systems distributors already use, automating tedious tasks and reducing failure points in moving physical goods across the globe.

We’re an 80-person team (~50 in engineering), located across North and South America.

The Role

Our customer base is growing fast, and we’re looking for a Junior Software Engineer eager to learn and grow with us. You’ll work alongside experienced engineers building scalable, high-performance systems that solve real-world problems in logistics and automation.

This is a great opportunity to gain exposure to modern engineering practices, real customers, and a product that delivers measurable business impact.

What You’ll Do

Work closely with senior engineers to design, build, and maintain backend systems that power our platform. Contribute to feature development, bug fixes, and performance improvements. Participate in code reviews, testing, and documentation to ensure quality and maintainability. Collaborate with product and design teams to bring ideas from concept to production. Learn new tools and technologies, and grow into greater ownership over time. 

What You'll Bring

Typically, 0–2 years of professional experience as a software engineer (internships or projects count!). Solid programming fundamentals and familiarity with at least one backend language (Go, Python, Node, etc.). Curiosity and a desire to understand how complex systems fit together. Eagerness to learn from others and contribute to a collaborative, high-performing team. Strong communication and problem-solving skills. Interest in startups, AI, or logistics a plus. 

Why Join Canals

Real-world impact: your work improves global supply chains, saving customers time and reducing waste. Strong engineering culture: we invest in quality and documentation to keep moving fast sustainably. Culture of ownership: moving fast while putting quality first. Remote-first, flexible work environment across North and South America. Stellar product-market fit with tons of customer love. All star team with diverse backgrounds to collaborate with and learn from. 

Canals.ai is an equal opportunity employer. In addition to EEO being the law, it is a policy that is fully consistent with our principles. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to status as a protected veteran or a qualified individual with a disability, or other protected status such as race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, genetic information, pregnancy or age.

descripcion:
Driven by our enthusiasm for meeting new talents and fostering connections within the community and as part of our profile mapping program, we are now exploring diverse roles, including Semi Senior QA Engineer to expand the Engineering area. It’s important to note that, in this instance, the role does not involve immediate hiring but rather serves as a part of a pipeline for future recruitments.

We're looking for a Ssr QA Engineer to join our remote multicultural team and be part of the full development cycle of web and mobile apps: including understanding business needs, designing solutions for specific problems, and developing the product.

What are the main responsibilities of this role?

Create detailed, comprehensive and well-structured test plans and test cases.Review clients needs and technical specifications with the development team, to provide timely and meaningful feedback.Estimate, prioritize, plan and coordinate testing activities of the project.Identify, record, document thoroughly and track bugs.Design, develop and execute automation scripts.Perform thorough regression testing when bugs are resolved.Track quality assurance metrics and reports.Stay up-to-date with new testing tools and strategies while encouraging the department technical improvement.Investigate the causes of non-conforming software and train development team to implement solutions to prevent them from happening in the future.Collaborate with internal initiatives.

Which skills and experience do we envision for this role?

Software experience from degree studies.+2 years of experience as a QA Engineer.Advanced English skills.Experience using AI tools to optimize the testing process, including test case creation, bug reporting, edge case identification, and test automation.

Nice To Have

Experience with mobile testing. 

Join Our Team And Enjoy

Access to Rootstrap University, Conferences/Certifications, and a Mentorship Program for your professional growth.Learning Bonus.Opportunities to organize cross-functional initiatives and receive 360 Feedback to improve your skills continuously.The flexibility to work remotely or from our offices in Montevideo, Buenos Aires, and Medellín, with a flexible time schedule and Workation program.Gym benefits, psychological counseling, and weekly lunch reimbursements with special foods in the offices.An Onboarding kit and access to cutting-edge technologies and tools to make your work easier.Referrals program bonuses, After offices, Prizes, and special occasions gifts to celebrate your achievements.People Care referent to support your well-being and personal development.

We value your well-being and happiness. We grow together!

How We Work

We offer a flexible and diverse work environment that fosters multicultural talentWe value autonomy and creativity, We want people to bring ideas to the table and to think as leaders.We put our focus on real human connectionsWe have a commitment to excellence

At Rootstrap, we help companies launch, grow, and scale their digital products and services. With over 290 global team members, we’ve built solutions for industry leaders like MasterClass, Universal, and Google, as well as for innovative startups and inspired pioneers. Our team takes pride in making an impact that goes beyond the code, earning regular recognition as a Fastest Growing Company and Best B2B Service Provider.

We embrace an AI-first mindset, continuously exploring how artificial intelligence can enhance the way we build products, solve problems, and deliver value. Across all stages of the development process, we encourage our teams to actively leverage AI to boost productivity and drive innovation.

With offices in Uruguay, Argentina, and Colombia, we offer the flexibility to work remotely. Discover more about life at Rootstrap at https://www.rootstrap.com/careers.

All of our candidate searches are covered under Uruguayan Law 19691 (the purpose of this law is to promote the inclusion of people with disabilities).

As part of our Security and Compliance process, all seniority levels and roles must follow the company’s information security policies and secure development practices, and promptly report any suspected security incidents or vulnerabilities.
razon_evaluacion: El rol de QA Engineer se alinea con el perfil híbrido del candidato, que incluye experiencia en testing. La oferta es remota, para nivel junior, y no requiere tecnologías excluyentes como Java.

descripcion:
Somos Ecosistemas Global, una compañía de tecnología que conecta a nuestros clientes con soluciones a medida, integrales e innovadoras. Operamos en más de 15 países, incluyendo Argentina, Chile, Brasil, México, Estados Unidos y España.

Con 30 años de experiencia y un equipo multidisciplinario de más de 500 profesionales, nos impulsamos por el compromiso de hacer crecer cada proyecto y cliente con el que trabajamos. ¡Queremos que seas parte de este gran equipo!

¿Qué estamos buscando?

Un Analista Tester Ssr para sumarse a una importante empresa de servicios financieros.

Lugar de trabajo: CABA

Modalidad: Hibrida

Jornada laboral: lunes a viernes de 9 a 18hs

¿Cuáles serán tus responsabilidades?

En Este Rol, Tendrás La Oportunidad De

Diseñar y ejecutar la estrategia de pruebas asociada a los proyectos

 Diseñar y ejecutar Casos de Pruebas en base a la estrategia de testing definida Participar del diseño de las estrategias de Automatización/simulación del Testing Reportar informes de defectos, avance y resultados de las pruebas a las partes interesadas Identificar, definir y controlar los ambientes depruebas. Revisar los informes de incidencias/bugs Resolver de forma proactiva los obstáculos o impedimentos que se presentan en el proyecto asumiendo riesgos Realizar tareas de capacitación y transferencia de conocimientos.

¿Qué necesitamos?

Que Cuentes Con

Estudiante avanzado o egresado de carreras de SistemasConocimientos en manejo de datos binarios y formato hexadecimalConocimientos avanzados en manejo de ExcelConocimientos en SQLConocimientos deseables, pero no excluyentes:Nociones básicas de estructuras de mensajes bajo estándar ISO (idealmente ISO 8583).Comprensión general de procesamiento de transacciones y mensajería financiera.Capacidad para interpretar logs técnicos y analizar información a bajo nivel.Interés en desarrollarse en medios de pago y sistemas transaccionalesConocimientos básicos de redes y protocolos de comunicaciónExperiencia o familiaridad con procesamiento de archivos y análisis de datos

Ofrecemos excelentes beneficios, oportunidades de crecimiento y te acompañaremos en tu desarrollo profesional.

En Ecosistemas Global consideramos que la diversidad enriquece nuestra cultura y perspectivas, por lo que fomentamos activamente un entorno inclusivo donde cada individuo, sin importar su origen, género, orientación, habilidades o creencias, no solo es bienvenido, sino también fundamental para nuestro éxito. Valoramos y respetamos todas las voces, y te invitamos a unirte a nuestro equipo, donde la inclusión es un pilar esencial de nuestros valores.

Se penaliza levemente por requerir conocimientos específicos de medios de pago/ISO 8583 que están fuera de su experiencia directa.

descripcion:
¡Sé parte de la transformación del comercio global! 

Somos la suite de soluciones 100% Cloud más completa para la integración y gestión punta a punta de toda la operación COMEX🚀

Desde SIDOM buscamos construir un mundo en el que los negocios fluyan sin obstáculos, donde las transacciones sean seguras, rápidas y eficientes; simplificando el comercio internacional con innovación y talento.

Esta visión nos inspira cada día a desafiar los límites y a construir tecnología que transforma. Nuestra pasión por la innovación, la excelencia y el trabajo colaborativo nos impulsa a crecer y a vivir con #ActitudSIDOM, siendo protagonistas de nuestro propio desarrollo y del futuro de SIDOM.

¿Qué buscamos?

Nos encontramos en la búsqueda de un QA automation con el objetivo de asegurar la calidad del software mediante la automatización de pruebas. Esta posición se enfoca en diseñar, desarrollar e implementar pruebas automatizadas para identificar defectos y garantizar que el software funcione correctamente según los requisitos especificados.

Responsabilidades

Ejecución de Pruebas e identificación de erroresMantenimiento de Scripts de PruebasParticipar en el ciclo de vida de desarrollo de software (SDLC) utilizando prácticas de integración continua (CI)Analizar los casos de prueba existentes y proponer mejoras para aumentar la cobertura de pruebas automatizadasMantener documentación detallada de los procedimientos de pruebas, resultados y cualquier ajuste en los scripts automatizadosTrabajar junto con desarrolladores, equipos de QA y otros departamentos para entender los requisitos y garantizar que las pruebas sean efectivas y alineadas con los objetivos del proyecto

Requisitos

Estudiantes y/o graduados de carreras a finesAl menos 3 años de experiencia en posiciones similaresExperiencia en herramientas de automatizaciónConocimientos en programación 

Beneficios

💪Tu bienestar primero: Medicina privada & Descuento en gimnasios

⚖Esquema híbrido de trabajo

🌴Vacaciones en días hábiles

🎈Day off por cumpleaños

🎉Contagiamos energía positiva. Celebramos juntos y disfrutamos beneficios corporativos en fechas especiales

🎓Impulsamos tu desarrollo. Clases de idiomas cubiertas por la compañía

💟SIDOM Week entre navidad y año nuevo

👶Maternidad SIDOM: Acompañamos este momento único con un regreso gradual

🍼Licencia extendida a 20 días hábiles por Paternidad/Persona no gestante

¿Por qué trabajar en SIDOM?

Porque en SIDOM no solo desarrollamos tecnología: creamos impacto.

Somos una compañía en crecimiento, donde la innovación, la colaboración y la pasión por lo que hacemos nos impulsan cada día.

Acá vas a encontrar:

💡Proyectos desafiantes que transforman el comercio internacional.

🤝 Un equipo auténtico y colaborativo, donde cada voz suma y las ideas se escuchan.

🚀 Oportunidades reales de crecimiento, donde podés ser protagonista de tu desarrollo.

🌕 Una cultura que se vive con energía, transparencia y #ActitudSIDOM.

En SIDOM creemos que el talento, cuando se potencia con propósito, no tiene límites.

¿Listo para llevar tus ideas #ToTheMoon? 🌕
razon_evaluacion: La oferta requiere al menos 3 años de experiencia en posiciones similares, lo que excede el nivel junior buscado por el candidato.

descripcion:
About Backblaze

Backblaze provides reliable, high-availability cloud storage trusted by consumers, SMBs, enterprises, and developers in over 150 countries. Backblaze B2 Cloud Storage supports data-intensive workloads including backup, media, analytics, and modern AI pipelines. Our teams focus on building durable, scalable systems with a strong emphasis on developer experience, operational excellence, and product reliability.

But while there is a lot to celebrate in our past, there is almost as much opportunity ahead of us. We’re seeking a QA Engineer, Open Source AI to join our team!

About The Role

We are seeking a QA Engineer to validate and ensure the reliability of open source AI integrations, frameworks, and example applications built on Backblaze B2 Cloud Storage. This is a hands-on role at the intersection of quality engineering and a fast-moving AI ecosystem, where the frameworks and applications you are testing are designed to support real AI workflows. This role is expected to actively use the latest AI coding agents and tools as part of everyday testing and validation work.

The primary objective is to execute structured testing across AI workflows, notebooks, frameworks, and integration examples to guarantee reproducibility, correctness, and production readiness. This includes validating end-to-end applications that demonstrate how B2 supports data ingestion, model storage, and retrieval across AI pipelines. This role requires continuous learning and ongoing evaluation of emerging AI frameworks and APIs as they evolve, and you will partner closely with Engineering and Product to ensure all public-facing assets meet high standards for stability, clarity, and usability.

What You’ll Do

Execute structured test plans across open source repositories, sample applications, SDK extensions, and AI workflow integrations.Perform functional, integration, and regression testing on frameworks, applications, notebooks, scripts, APIs, and reference implementations.Validate reproducibility of AI workflows in Jupyter and Google Colab environments.Test agent-generated code outputs to ensure correctness, determinism, and alignment with expected B2 usage patterns.Identify defects, edge cases, and environment inconsistencies; document findings clearly in Jira, GitHub, or other QA systems.Coordinate retest cycles with Engineering and confirm resolution of reported issues.Maintain baseline test scenarios aligned to common ICP workflows and real-world B2 storage use cases.Support CI validation processes to ensure ongoing test coverage across releases and updates.

Tools And Technologies

Python, Jupyter notebooks, Google ColabBackblaze B2 SDKs and REST APIsJira, TestRail, GitHub Issuespytest or lightweight testing librariesGitHub Actions and CI pipelinesAPI validation tools such as PostmanBasic command-line workflows

The Right Fit

QA analyst or junior to mid-level QA engineer with strong technical understanding of AI workflows.Experience executing functional and regression tests in Python-based environments.Comfortable running notebooks, scripts, and example applications to validate expected behavior.Strong attention to detail and ability to perform repeatable validation cycles efficiently.Clear documentation and communication skills when reporting defects and edge cases.Familiarity with cloud storage concepts and API-driven systems.Exposure to AI workflows, agent-based systems, or data pipeline validation is preferred.

Why Backblaze

Ensure the reliability of open source AI integrations used by developers globally.Work at the intersection of AI, data workflows, and cloud storage.Collaborate closely with Engineering, Product, and Developer Experience teams.Competitive compensation and benefits.Remote-first culture supporting work-life balance.

At this point, we hope you're feeling excited about the job description you're reading. Even if you don't meet every requirement, we still encourage you to apply. Learning, developing, and growing are key parts of our culture. We're eager to meet people who believe in our mission and can contribute to our team in various ways. We want people to feel comfortable expressing their true selves and to come, stay, and do their best work here.

At Backblaze, we value being fair and good to our customers, partners, and employees. That’s why diversity, equity, and inclusion are at the core of our values. We are committed to fostering a workforce where all employees feel a sense of belonging regardless of race, ethnicity, nationality, gender, sexual orientation, age, religion, socio-economic status, ability, veteran status, and education. We believe that our dedication to cultivating a diverse workspace not only allows us to better serve our customers in over 175 countries but further reinforces our commitment to doing the right thing. We are proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer.

To understand more about the data we collect and process as part of your application, please view our Backblaze Employee Privacy Notice.

#LATAM
razon_evaluacion: El rol de QA Engineer se alinea con el perfil de QA Tester del candidato y requiere Python (no en su stack principal pero menciona experiencia en testing), aunque el foco en AI/ML y herramientas específicas (Jupyter, Colab) reduce el match técnico directo. La modalidad remota y nivel junior/mid son compatibles.

descripcion:
Qué buscamos

Buscamos un QA Analyst que garantice la calidad de los productos a través de pruebas de distintos niveles, que permitan contrastar las definiciones contra las implementaciones de los productos.

Principales responsabilidades

Participar activamente en programas de formación diseñados para adquirir conocimientos sobre las metodologías y estándares de QA.Comprender los flujos de trabajo y herramientas utilizadas en cada uno de los procesos de prueba.Participar activamente en todos los eventos scrum de los proyectos.Ejecutar pruebas funcionales manuales y/o automatizadas garantizando que el software cumpla con los requisitos especificados.Identificar errores o problemas documentando evidencias para cada ejecución.Mantener el etiquetado y nivel de confidencialidad de los documentos de su gestión de acuerdo a lo definido en el sistema Seguridad de la Información (SI).

Requisitos

Formación en tecnicaturas o carreras de grado tales como Ingenieria en Informatica, Ingenieria en Sistemas de la Información, Ciencias de la computacion o carreras afines. No se requiere experiencia.Inglés nivel intermedio (deseable).Conocimientos de metodologías ágiles (deseable).Conocimientos de herramientas de gestión de proyectos (ej. Jira).Conocimientos básicos sobre los diferentes tipos de pruebas.

¿Qué ofrecemos?

Salario competitivo y revisiones periódicasCobertura médica OSDEBono anual por desempeñoDías adicionales de vacacionesDías libres en el año Día de cumpleaños libre (con sorpresa!)Capacitaciones para el desarrollo profesionalDescuentos en Gastronomía, Transporte y Servicio de InternetCréditos para el almuerzo Línea de telefonía celularPolítica de maternidad, paternidad o adopción. 

Condiciones de trabajo

Modalidad de trabajo: Full time - híbrida

Zona de trabajo: CABA

Si te interesa esta oportunidad ¡postulate!

¿Quiénes somos?

En Widergy proveemos soluciones de tecnología que contribuyen a una gestión más eficiente y consciente de la energía, del gas y del agua.

Somos una compañía que impulsa la digitalización de las empresas de servicios públicos (Utilities) con herramientas poderosas que contribuyen a transformar la manera en que las personas y las organizaciones se relacionan con los servicios esenciales.

¿Qué hacemos?

Desarrollamos plataformas con Inteligencia Artificial y capacidades IoT para las Utilities del futuro, que se destacan por su flexibilidad, facilidad de integración, performance, seguridad, escalabilidad y transparencia.

Queremos ser un actor relevante en la transición energética, desarrollando tecnología que permita a las utilities ofrecer experiencias digitales excepcionales a sus consumidores y acelerar los nuevos modelos de negocios.
