descripcion:
Location: Remote

Type: Full-time or Part-time Contract Work

Fluent Language Skills Required: English & Italian. Native-level fluency in English and Italian is required for this position.

Why This Role Exists

We believe the safest AI is the one that’s already been attacked — by us. We are assembling a red team for this project - human data experts who probe AI models with adversarial inputs, surface vulnerabilities, and generate the red team data that makes AI safer for our customers.

This project involves reviewing AI outputs that touch on sensitive topics such as bias, misinformation, or harmful behaviors. All work is text-based, and participation in higher-sensitivity projects is optional and supported by clear guidelines and wellness resources. Before being exposed to any content, the topics will be clearly communicated.

What You’ll Do

Red team conversational AI models and agents: jailbreaks, prompt injections, misuse cases, bias exploitation, multi-turn manipulation Generate high-quality human data: annotate failures, classify vulnerabilities, and flag systemic risks Apply structure: follow taxonomies, benchmarks, and playbooks to keep testing consistent Document reproducibly: produce reports, datasets, and attack cases customers can act on 

Who You Are

You bring prior red teaming experience (AI adversarial work, cybersecurity, socio-technical probing) You’re curious and adversarial: you instinctively push systems to breaking points You’re structured: you use frameworks or benchmarks, not just random hacks You’re communicative: you explain risks clearly to technical and non-technical stakeholders You’re adaptable: thrive on moving across projects and customers 

Nice-to-Have Specialties

Adversarial ML: jailbreak datasets, prompt injection, RLHF/DPO attacks, model extraction Cybersecurity: penetration testing, exploit development, reverse engineering Socio-technical risk: harassment/disinfo probing, abuse analysis, conversational AI testing Creative probing: psychology, acting, writing for unconventional adversarial thinking 

What Success Looks Like

You uncover vulnerabilities automated tests miss You deliver reproducible artifacts that strengthen customer AI systems Evaluation coverage expands: more scenarios tested, fewer surprises in production
razon_evaluacion: La oferta es para un rol especializado en red teaming de IA y ciberseguridad, que requiere experiencia previa en pruebas adversarias y fluidez nativa en italiano, tecnologías y habilidades fuera del stack y perfil del candidato.

descripcion:
Voldex is a leading gaming company focused on Roblox, the most exciting ecosystem in gaming today. We are home to several of Roblox's top games, including Brookhaven, Driving Empire, and NFL Universe Football. With over 160 million monthly active players across our games, we are the #1 Roblox developer by audience size. Founded in 2015, we have since grown to 85+ full-time remote team members across the globe.

Our strategy is to acquire and sustainably grow games on Roblox. Our acquisition strategy is backed with significant capital from firms including The Raine Group, Makers Fund, Andreessen Horowitz (a16z), QIA, Dune Ventures, and MIT.

Our top games include:

Brookhaven, #1 Roleplay game on Roblox and the most popular game on the Roblox platform Driving Empire, the #1 Driving game on Roblox where we’ve brought real cars into the game in partnership with automakers NFL Universe Football, the #1 American football game and top grossing sports game on Roblox. 

Role Overview

Brookhaven is one of the leading roleplay games on Roblox, and every update matters. You’ll think like a player, test like a creator, and partner closely with designers and developers to protect the player experience.

🌟 If you live and breathe Roblox, notice the small details others miss, and love being the last line of defence before launch — this is your opportunity to make a huge impact on a game played by millions.

What You’ll Do

Test Brookhaven in both a LIVE and QA environment across Mobile, Tablet, PC, and Console, ensuring comprehensive coverage & that issues are identified earlyReproduce and document issues with complete supporting materials (logs, screenshots, reproduction steps)Conduct testing from a player-experience perspective, representing Brookhaven’s community voiceCollaborate with the QA Lead to create and execute comprehensive test plans which anticipate issues ahead of releaseWork closely with other QA testers by communicating progress, risks, and test results clearly to ensure effective coverage across tests

Who You Are

Proficient in written and spoken English communicationExperience as an active player on the Roblox platform with a strong understanding of Roblox player behaviourExcellent attention to detail and ability to identify inconsistencies, issues, or things that don’t look rightAbility to clearly and concisely present complex information in an understandable wayStrong organizational skills with the ability to prioritize and meet deadlinesAble to remain focused and methodical when approaching repetitive or high-volume tasksAbility to work and communicate effectively with people at all levelsAbility to work full-time (40+ hours per week)Be 18 years of age or older

Nice to Have

Previous experience working on Roblox games professionallyPrior experience working in QA

Tech Stack

While experience with the following tech stack is NOT expected or necessary for candidates, please see below Voldex’s tech stack in case you are interested:Monday.comGoogle SuiteDiscord
Location

Remote / Timezone: Must be willing to work 9 - 5 UK timeTravel: 2 to 3x / year (RDC + possible team meet-ups)Ideal Hiring Regions: UK, Canada, LATAM

Voldex is an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on race, color, ethnicity, ancestry, national origin, religion, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, genetic information, marital status or any legally protected status

Permanent Voldex employees enjoy the following benefits:

💰 Competitive compensation - above-market salary + profit sharing + stock options

⛳️ Retirement benefits - company contribution to your retirement plan (401k, RRSP, Pension), in Canada, UK and USA!

🩺 Medical, dental, and vision benefits - depending on the country, there may be additional benefits (Life, ADD, etc…) such as Canada, UK and USA.

🏖 Flexible PTO - vacations + Federal / Bank Holidays

🌎 Remote First - we have always been remote and will remain that way including work from home/anywhere

🎮 In-person get-togethers, virtual company-wide game events, Robux allowances, and so much more!

🎓Professional Development - Reimburse the costs of courses, materials, and anything to help further their training and growth

🎉 Work with awesome people and impact millions of daily players

Want to learn more about Voldex? Read about us here:

Voldex Acquires Brookhaven, most visited game on Roblox Driving Empire & Nascar: Brand Partnership Voldex & NFL: Brand Partnership Our partners at Andreessen Horowitz share why they've invested in Voldex

Desarrollador Senior · PrestaShop | Expert @ Alcalink
En Alcalink, Agencia Nº1 de PrestaShop en España y Partner Expert, no buscamos a alguien que solo sepa instalar módulos. Buscamos a un Senior Web Developer que domine el ecosistema a nivel de arquitectura y que se sienta cómodo liderando la parte técnica de proyectos de gran envergadura.Si tienes el colmillo retorcido tras años de pelearte con el core de PrestaShop y buscas un equipo a tu altura, este es tu sitio.
Tu Rol y ResponsabilidadesComo desarrollador senior, serás el referente técnico en proyectos críticos:Desarrollo Backend Avanzado: Creación de módulos complejos y overrides siguiendo las best practices de PrestaShop y Symfony.Arquitectura de Datos: Diseño y optimización de bases de datos MySQL para entornos con catálogos masivos.Integraciones de Terceros: Conexión con ERPs (Sage, SAP, Microsoft Dynamics), CRMs y plataformas logísticas.WPO y Rendimiento: Auditoría y optimización de tiempos de carga y Core Web Vitals.Mentoring y Code Review: Asegurar la calidad del código del equipo y proponer mejoras en los flujos de trabajo (GitFlow).
¿Qué perfil buscamos?Esta es una posición para un perfil consolidado. Requerimos:Experiencia: Mínimo 5 años en desarrollo web enfocado en eCommerce PrestaShop.Portfolio Comprobable: Debes acreditar al menos 10 proyectos PrestaShop activos en los que hayas tenido una participación directa y relevante (se solicitarán referencias o ejemplos).Stack Técnico:Dominio experto de PHP 7/8 y Symfony.Maquetación avanzada con Smarty/Twig, Sass y conocimiento de frameworks modernos (Tailwind/Vue).Gestión avanzada de bases de datos y SQL.Uso fluido de Git y herramientas de despliegue.

titulo: Full Stack Developer + IoT — Sistema de Cobro Automatizado (MVP 8 semanas)
descripcion: Buscamos equipo de 2-3 personas para desarrollar el MVP de un sistema de cobro automatizado y control de acceso para estacionamientos operados sin personal en Ciudad de Buenos Aires.El sistema permite a conductores entrar, pagar y salir escaneando QR con su celular. Sin app nativa, sin efectivo, sin personal en sitio. Operación 24/7.El equipo tiene que cubrir: ∙ Backend: Node.js + Express o Python + FastAPI + PostgreSQL ∙ Frontend: React o Next.js, mobile-first ∙ IoT/Firmware: ESP32 con WiFi/4G, control de relé, heartbeat, OTA updates ∙ Pagos: MercadoPago Checkout Pro con webhooks e idempotencia ∙ Deploy: Railway, Render, AWS o GCP con health checksCondiciones: ∙ 8 semanas de desarrollo ∙ Presupuesto hasta USD 20.000 ∙ Pago por hitos, no mensual adelantado ∙ Entregable semana 2: flujo QR → pago → barrera abre funcionando de verdad ∙ 30 días de garantía de bugfix post-entrega incluidosPara postular: enviar desglose por módulo con precio y horas estimadas, portfolio o proyecto similar demostrable, y preguntas sobre el proyecto. Sin preguntas no se considera la propuesta.Se envía documentación técnica completa a quienes pasen el primer filtro

descripcion:
Canonical is a leading provider of open source software and operating systems to the global enterprise and technology markets. Our platform, Ubuntu, is very widely used in breakthrough enterprise initiatives such as public cloud, data science, AI, engineering innovation, and IoT. Our customers include the world's leading public cloud and silicon providers, and industry leaders in many sectors. The company is a pioneer of global distributed collaboration, with 1200+ colleagues in 75+ countries and very few office-based roles. Teams meet two to four times yearly in person, in interesting locations around the world, to align on strategy and execution.

The company is founder-led, profitable, and growing.

We are hiring a Junior developer with a proven track record in Python and/or Go. As part of the Observability team, you will develop a cloud-native monitoring stack that composes best-in-class open-source monitoring tools. The stack is opinionated, resilient, and scalable, providing deep insights out of the box. The user experience is polished and seamless for the end-users, and its administrators will enjoy smooth, lightweight Day 1 and Day 2 operations.

This is an exciting opportunity for a software engineer passionate about open source software, Linux, Kubernetes, and Observability. Build a rewarding, meaningful career working with the best and brightest people in technology at Canonical, the growing international software company behind Ubuntu.

The monitoring stack will monitor applications running on a mix of cloud technologies such as Kubernetes and OpenStack, as well as bare-metal, virtual machines and containers. The stack will be capable of monitoring applications and infrastructure irrespective of whether they are operated by Juju, and will leverage multiple data sources at various levels of the architecture, including Juju itself, to contextualize the collected telemetry and insights delivered to the end-users.

You can read more about the project here and here.

Location: This role will be based remotely in the EMEA and Americas regions

The role entails

Collaborate proactively with a globally distributed teamWrite, test and document high quality code to create new featuresDebug issues and interact with a vibrant communityReview code produced by other engineersAttend conferences to represent Canonical and the Charmed Observability StackWork from home with global travel 2 to 4 weeks for internal and external events

What we are looking for in you

You love technology and working with brilliant peopleYou value soft skills and are passionate, enterprising, thoughtful, and self-motivatedYou have a Bachelor's or equivalent in Computer Science, STEM or similar degreeYou are a skilled Python developer, preferably with a track record in open sourceYou have a working knowledge of GoYou have interest and experience with two or more of the following: Ubuntu Linux, container images, Debian packaging, snap, distributed systems.

What we offer colleagues

We consider geographical location, experience, and performance in shaping compensation worldwide. We revisit compensation annually (and more often for graduates and associates) to ensure we recognize outstanding performance. In addition to base pay, we offer a performance-driven annual bonus or commission. We provide all team members with additional benefits which reflect our values and ideals. We balance our programs to meet local needs and ensure fairness globally.

Distributed work environment with twice-yearly team sprints in personPersonal learning and development budget of USD 2,000 per yearAnnual compensation reviewRecognition rewardsAnnual holiday leaveMaternity and paternity leaveTeam Member Assistance Program & Wellness PlatformOpportunity to travel to new locations to meet colleaguesPriority Pass and travel upgrades for long-haul company events

About Canonical

Canonical is a pioneering tech firm at the forefront of the global move to open source. As the company that publishes Ubuntu, one of the most important open-source projects and the platform for AI, IoT, and the cloud, we are changing the world of software. We recruit on a global basis and set a very high standard for people joining the company. We expect excellence; in order to succeed, we need to be the best at what we do. Most colleagues at Canonical have worked from home since our inception in 2004. Canonical is an equal opportunity employer

We are proud to foster a workplace free from discrimination. Diversity of experience, perspectives, and background create a better work environment and better products. Whatever your identity, we will give your application fair consideration.

descripcion:
About HappyRobot

HappyRobot is the infrastructure for enterprises to build and orchestrate AI workforces. Our AI workers don't just communicate - they make decisions, take action, and run operations autonomously across voice, email, and enterprise systems. Born in Y Combinator (S23) and backed by a16z and Base10 with over $60M raised, we power critical operations for global enterprises worldwide.

Our platform is battle-tested in the most demanding environments - where AI has real consequences. We started in logistics, built our own voice stack, models, and orchestration layer from the ground up, and are now bringing that infrastructure to every enterprise that runs the real economy. Learn more about our vision in our manifesto.

Role Overview

We are looking for a versatile and highly skilled Forward Deployed Engineer based in Argentina to join our team. In this role, you will combine strong technical abilities with excellent communication skills, working directly with customers to ensure they maximize the value of HappyRobot’s AI platform. You will be involved in onboarding, implementation, and ongoing support, while also contributing to product development and innovation.

At HappyRobot, there’s no role seniority or hierarchy — we operate as a team of builders. We execute, we build, we own, and we care deeply about our customers and their success.

What You’ll Do

Customer-Facing Engineering – Work closely with customers from onboarding to ongoing usage, helping them integrate and optimize our AI solutions.Technical Development – Build new features, MVPs, and scalable solutions that directly impact customer outcomes.Full-Stack Development – Utilize React, TypeScript, Node.js, and Python to develop robust applications and tools.AI/ML Applications – Design, implement, and iterate on AI/ML solutions, including LLM prompting, tuning of voices, and transcribers to optimize use cases.Integration & APIs – Manage APIs and integrations with third-party systems to ensure seamless functionality for customers.Cross-Functional Collaboration – Partner with Product, Engineering, and Customer Success teams to deliver tailored solutions.Iterative Problem-Solving – Continuously iterate and improve AI solutions based on customer feedback and evolving requirements.Project Management – Prioritize and manage multiple projects under tight deadlines while maintaining high-quality results.

Must Have

Strong full-stack experience: React, TypeScript, Node.js.Hands-on proficiency in Python.Experience building AI/ML applications, including LLM prompting and tuning.Ability to manage APIs and integrate with third-party systems.Excellent communication skills with the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.Proven ability to prioritize and manage multiple projects under tight deadlines.Founder mindset: highly independent, takes ownership, and thrives in a fast-paced environment.

Why join us?

Opportunity to work at a high-growth AI startup, backed by top investors.Rapidly growing and backed by top investors including a16z, Y Combinator, and Base10.Ownership & Autonomy - Take full ownership of projects and ship fast.Top-Tier Compensation - Competitive salary + equity in a high-growth startup.Comprehensive Benefits - Healthcare, dental, vision coverage.Work With the Best - Join a world-class team of engineers and builders

Our Operating Principles

Extreme Ownership 

We take full responsibility for our work, outcomes, and team success. No excuses, no blame-shifting — if something needs fixing, we own it and make it better. This means stepping up, even when it’s not “your job.” If a ball is dropped, we pick it up. If a customer is unhappy, we fix it. If a process is broken, we redesign it. We don’t wait for someone else to solve it — we lead with accountability and expect the same from those around us.

Craftsmanship 

Putting care and intention into every task, striving for excellence, and taking deep ownership of the quality and outcome of your work. Craftsmanship means never settling for “just fine.” We sweat the details because details compound. Whether it’s a product feature, an internal doc, or a sales call — we treat it as a reflection of our standards. We aim to deliver jaw-dropping customer experiences by being curious, meticulous, and proud of what we build — even when nobody’s watching.

We are “majos”

Be friendly & have fun with your coworkers. Always be genuine & honest, but kind. “Majo” is our way of saying: be a good human. Be approachable, helpful, and warm. We’re building something ambitious, and it’s easier (and more fun) when we enjoy the ride together. We give feedback with kindness, challenge each other with respect, and celebrate wins together without ego.

Urgency with Focus

Create the highest impact in the shortest amount of time. Move fast, but in the right direction. We operate with speed because time is our most limited resource. But speed without focus is chaos. We prioritize ruthlessly, act decisively, and stay aligned. We aim for high leverage: the biggest results from the simplest, smartest actions. We’re running a high-speed marathon — not a sprint with no strategy.

Talent Density and Meritocracy

Hire only people who can raise the average; ‘exceptional performance is the passing grade.’ Ability trumps seniority. We believe the best teams are built on talent density — every hire should raise the bar. We reward contribution, not titles or tenure. We give ownership to those who earn it, and we all hold each other to a high standard. A-players want to work with other A-players — that’s how we win.

First-Principles Thinking

Strip a problem to physics-level facts, ignore industry dogma, rebuild the solution from scratch. We don’t copy-paste solutions. We go back to basics, ask why things are the way they are, and rebuild from the ground up if needed. This mindset pushes us to innovate, challenge stale assumptions, and move faster than incumbents. It’s how we build what others think is impossible.

The personal data provided in your application and during the selection process will be processed by Happyrobot, Inc., acting as Data Controller.

By sending us your CV, you consent to the processing of your personal data for the purpose of evaluating and selecting you as a candidate for the position. Your personal data will be treated confidentially and will only be used for the recruitment process of the selected job offer.

In relation to the period of conservation of your personal data, these will be eliminated after three months of inactivity in compliance with the GDPR and legislation on the protection of personal data.

If you wish to exercise your rights of access, rectification, deletion, portability or opposition in relation to your personal data, you can do so through security@happyrobot.ai subject to the GDPR.

For more information, visit https://www.happyrobot.ai/privacy-policy

By submitting your request, you confirm that you have read and understood this clause and that you agree to the processing of your personal data as described.

titulo: AI Engineer Intern - AI/ML/GenAI Design & Development
descripcion:
About PM Accelerator: PM Accelerator is a US based company with a global reach premiering in AI learning and as a development hub, featuring award-winning AI products and mentors from top-tier companies such as Google, Meta, Apple, and Nvidia. We offer a dynamic AI PM Bootcamp, designed to empower the next generation of AI professionals through hands-on experience, mentorship, and real-world projects.
Company Website: https://www.pmaccelerator.io/
Role Overview: We are seeking passionate and motivated AI Engineering Interns for the Spring & Summer 2026 semesters to partner with other professionals within the USA. This internship is ideal for individuals with a strong interest in AI, eager to learn and explore cutting-edge AI tools and frameworks and want to have experience interning at a U.S. based company. As part of our team, you will work on projects involving large language models (LLMs), machine learning, prompt engineering, GenAI application development, ChatGPT API integration, and data pipeline development. You will collaborate with a multidisciplinary team, including AI-software engineers, data scientists, UI/UX designers and product managers from our PM Accelerator community to bring innovative tech ideas to life.
Requirements: International Candidates (non-US or Canada) must be willing to overlap at least 4-hours per day to communicate with US teams. The times can be negotiable with the teams once accepted and joining on an AI product. Fluency in English is necessary. 
AI Engineer Intern can be existing working software engineers, data scientist professionals or accredited college students Bachelors/Masters/PhD (in Computer Science, Computer/Software Engineering, Data Analytics, AI Engineering programs).  Front-end skills should primarily be in React.JSBack-end skills should primarily be in PythonData Science skills should primarily be in modeling and data pipelines
During your internship, you will work with PM Accelerator’s existing PM students, who are within the USA and around the world, inside of the AI PM bootcamp. They will drive real world user pain points into AI minimum-viable-product (MVP) solutions.
Team Structure will be the following:AI/ML Engineers - Front-end and/or Backend, or Data Science Product Managers from the PMA communityUI/UX designers
Key Responsibilities:Collaborate with product managers, designers, and data scientists to design and develop AI-driven and GenAI applications.Engage in continuous learning and exploration of GenAI tools and frameworks, applying them in real-world scenarios.Contribute to either front-end or back-end development, depending on your expertise.Execute the integration of AI technologies, including LLMs, machine learning models, prompt engineering, and various APIs, into applications.Contribute to the creation and optimization of data pipelines supporting AI models and product features.Participate in regular team meetings and contribute to the agile development process.
Required Skills:Strong interest in AI and a willingness to learn and explore GenAI tools and frameworks.Programming skills in languages such as Python, JavaScript (React, Angular, Express.js, Node.js, NextJS), or similar.Front-end and Back-end engineers are welcome; Full-Stack developers are preferred.Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work in a collaborative environment.Strong communication skills, both written and verbal.
Preferred Skills :Frontend: Ability to use asynchronous API calls in React via fetch or axios to make HTTP requests to an LLM API endpoint. Frontend: Ability to consider user interactions when interacting with a model and guide users accordinglyBackend - Understanding of machine learning concepts and frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch).Backend/Frontend - API integration - Familiarity with REST, GraphQL, or gRPC.Data Scientist = Familiarity with data pipelines: Ingestion, Cleaning/preprocessing, Transformation/Feature Engineering, Model Training/Evaluation, Model Deploying/Serving and Monitoring/Maintenance
Benefits:Hands-On Experience: Master the skills needed to develop and launch real-life GenAI products, a significant advantage for your future career.Free AI Engineer Certification: Upon successful completion of the internship, you will receive an AI Engineer Certification.LinkedIn Recognition: Add your role as an AI Engineer to your LinkedIn experience section, highlighting your work on the project.Tech Advisor Support: Access weekly office hours hosted by our tech advisors to help guide your development.Educational Resources: Gain access to recommended tech courses tailored for developers and data scientists.Networking Opportunities: Connect with AI/ML engineer job referral opportunities within our AI Project community channel.School Credit: Eligible to receive school credit if required by your university.Fully-remote: We welcome qualified candidates from all over the world to apply for this position.
Note: This is an unpaid internship opportunity with CPT and OPT sponsorship available for eligible candidates. If you already graduated, you are welcome to apply as well.
Internship timeline:Option 1: Early-April to Mid-June (2026)Option 2: Late-June to Late-August (2026)
The internship program is a 3-month duration.
Qualified candidates are encouraged to continue to a 6-month internship
Application Process: To apply, please submit the following information:ResumeLink to your LinkedIn profileWhat time do you want to do the internship: Option 1, 2, or all of themCover letter explaining your interest in AI, why you are interested in this role, and how you hope to contribute to our team. Link to your Github depository (if available).
Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis.

descripcion:
This role is open to candidates based in Latin America.
AEM is moving to Edge Delivery Services. Most developers are still figuring out what that means. You already know.
EDS is Adobe’s new delivery architecture: lightweight, Git-based, built on vanilla JavaScript and modern web standards. It’s fast, it’s where Adobe is heading, and the developers who know it well right now are rare. Better Digital is building EDS capability to support enterprise AEM clients making this transition, and we are hiring two strong front-end developers who can build production-grade EDS experiences.
You’ll work directly with our US-based AEM architects. They design the architecture and content model. You build the blocks, implement the components, and make sure what ships is fast, accessible, and correct.
What this takes:Strong front-end fundamentals: JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Web ComponentsHands-on EDS experience, or deep AEM Sites experience with a demonstrated ability to learn new Adobe architectures quicklyUnderstanding of performance-first development and Core Web VitalsFamiliarity with Git-based workflows and GitHubConversational English required. You will collaborate daily with US-based architects and practitioners.
You are accountable for whether the front-end implementation performs, renders correctly, and meets the quality standard the engagement requires.
Why Better Digital:This industry burns good people out. Large SIs hand you a ticket queue and a client who’s already been oversold. Small shops keep you busy but rarely make you better.
Better Digital is the third option. We are intentionally small, senior at every level, and built around work that actually matters. No layers. No handoffs. The same people who design the architecture are accountable for whether it performs.
You will work alongside people who have been doing this longer than most firms have existed. The expectation is simple: you own your work, your decisions, and the outcome. That is the standard here.
The problems are hard. The clients are real. And the reputation you build here will follow you for the rest of your career.
This role offers a contract rate in the range of $6,000 to $8,000 per month in USD, based on experience.
If you want to build EDS for enterprise clients at the front of where AEM is going, let’s talk.
Direct applicants only. No agencies or third-party recruiters.
###

Sin embargo, se enfoca en AEM/EDS, una tecnología específica de Adobe que no está en tu experiencia declarada, y el nivel de autonomía sugiere un perfil más sólido que junior.

descripcion:
Canonical is a leading provider of open source software and operating systems to the global enterprise and technology markets. Our platform, Ubuntu, is very widely used in breakthrough enterprise initiatives such as public cloud, data science, AI, engineering innovation, and IoT. Our customers include the world's leading public cloud and silicon providers, and industry leaders in many sectors. The company is a pioneer of global distributed collaboration, with 1200+ colleagues in 75+ countries and very few office-based roles. Teams meet two to four times yearly in person, in interesting locations around the world, to align on strategy and execution.

The company is founder-led, profitable, and growing.

We are hiring a Junior developer with a proven track record in Python and/or Go. As part of the Observability team, you will develop a cloud-native monitoring stack that composes best-in-class open-source monitoring tools. The stack is opinionated, resilient, and scalable, providing deep insights out of the box. The user experience is polished and seamless for the end-users, and its administrators will enjoy smooth, lightweight Day 1 and Day 2 operations.

This is an exciting opportunity for a software engineer passionate about open source software, Linux, Kubernetes, and Observability. Build a rewarding, meaningful career working with the best and brightest people in technology at Canonical, the growing international software company behind Ubuntu.

The monitoring stack will monitor applications running on a mix of cloud technologies such as Kubernetes and OpenStack, as well as bare-metal, virtual machines and containers. The stack will be capable of monitoring applications and infrastructure irrespective of whether they are operated by Juju, and will leverage multiple data sources at various levels of the architecture, including Juju itself, to contextualize the collected telemetry and insights delivered to the end-users.

You can read more about the project here and here.

Location: This role will be based remotely in the EMEA and Americas regions

The role entails

Collaborate proactively with a globally distributed teamWrite, test and document high quality code to create new featuresDebug issues and interact with a vibrant communityReview code produced by other engineersAttend conferences to represent Canonical and the Charmed Observability StackWork from home with global travel 2 to 4 weeks for internal and external events

What we are looking for in you

You love technology and working with brilliant peopleYou value soft skills and are passionate, enterprising, thoughtful, and self-motivatedYou have a Bachelor's or equivalent in Computer Science, STEM or similar degreeYou are a skilled Python developer, preferably with a track record in open sourceYou have a working knowledge of GoYou have interest and experience with two or more of the following: Ubuntu Linux, container images, Debian packaging, snap, distributed systems.

What we offer colleagues

We consider geographical location, experience, and performance in shaping compensation worldwide. We revisit compensation annually (and more often for graduates and associates) to ensure we recognize outstanding performance. In addition to base pay, we offer a performance-driven annual bonus or commission. We provide all team members with additional benefits which reflect our values and ideals. We balance our programs to meet local needs and ensure fairness globally.

Distributed work environment with twice-yearly team sprints in personPersonal learning and development budget of USD 2,000 per yearAnnual compensation reviewRecognition rewardsAnnual holiday leaveMaternity and paternity leaveTeam Member Assistance Program & Wellness PlatformOpportunity to travel to new locations to meet colleaguesPriority Pass and travel upgrades for long-haul company events

About Canonical

Canonical is a pioneering tech firm at the forefront of the global move to open source. As the company that publishes Ubuntu, one of the most important open-source projects and the platform for AI, IoT, and the cloud, we are changing the world of software. We recruit on a global basis and set a very high standard for people joining the company. We expect excellence; in order to succeed, we need to be the best at what we do. Most colleagues at Canonical have worked from home since our inception in 2004. Working here is a step into the future and will challenge you to think differently, work smarter, learn new skills, and raise your game.

Canonical is an equal opportunity employer

We are proud to foster a workplace free from discrimination. Diversity of experience, perspectives, and background create a better work environment and better products. Whatever your identity, we will give your application fair consideration.

descripcion:
Job Overview

We’re specifically looking for someone with strong React Native experience, as mobile is a central focus of our roadmap. Familiarity with React for web is also important, as our platform spans both environments. You’ll collaborate with a cross-functional team of engineers, designers, and product leads to deliver seamless, high-performance applications that power modern product teams.

Key Responsibilities

Support Agent+ customers by building custom components, features, and workflows tailored to their product needs. Design and implement robust front-end solutions using our visual IDE, optimizing for performance and scalability. Work closely with UX/UI designers to translate design concepts into functional code. Contribute to the development lifecycle, including coding, testing, debugging, and deployment. Ensure high-quality graphic standards and brand consistency. Stay updated with emerging front-end technologies and methodologies, integrating them to enhance our platform's capabilities. Maintain an online presence between the hours of 9am - 4pm EST

Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience. Proven experience as a Front-End Developer or similar role, preferably in tech or startup environments. Expertise in front-end technologies, including JavaScript, CSS, HTML, and frameworks like React.js, and tailwind. Experience with responsive and adaptive design principles. Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail. Excellent communication and teamwork skills, with a knack for bridging the gap between technical and non-technical teams. 

What we offer

The opportunity to be part of an innovative, fast-growing startup. A collaborative, flexible, and supportive work environment where your contributions directly impact the product's success. 

Compensation Range: $40K - $60K

descripcion:
About The Role

As a Full‑Stack Software Engineer, you will make an impact by developing scalable, high‑quality web applications that integrate structured content using modern engineering practices. You will be a valued member of our engineering team, collaborating with senior engineers, technical leads, and cross‑functional partners to deliver innovative, user‑centric solutions for our clients.

In This Role, You Will

Build and maintain high‑quality features for client‑facing applications, ensuring clean, maintainable, and efficient code.Configure and manage Contentful spaces, optimize content models, and integrate content via SDK or GraphQL.Design and implement dynamic, user‑friendly interfaces using Next.js with a strong focus on performance and usability.Deploy and manage applications on Vercel, ensuring optimized builds and seamless integration with modern frameworks.Collaborate with cross‑functional teams to translate business requirements into robust technical solutions and contribute to architectural discussions.Stay up to date with emerging technologies and best practices to continuously improve code quality and development efficiency.

Work Model

We believe hybrid work is the way forward as we strive to provide flexibility wherever possible. Based on this role’s business requirements, this is a hybrid position requiring 2-3 days a week in a client or Cognizant office in Buenos Aires, Argentina. Regardless of your working arrangement, we are here to support a healthy work-life balance though our various wellbeing programs.

The working arrangements for this role are accurate as of the date of posting. These may change based on the project you’re engaged in as well as business and client requirements. Rest assured—we will always be clear about role expectations.

What You Need To Have To Be Considered

Strong proficiency in JavaScript, ReactJS / Next.js, and experience deploying applications on Vercel.Hands‑on experience with Contentful, including configuration, content modeling, and integration.Solid experience with Node.js, TypeScript, and GraphQL.Fundamental CMS knowledge (Contentful, Sanity, Strapi, or similar).Familiarity with version control systems such as Git.Ability to collaborate effectively with cross‑functional teams and communicate technical concepts clearly.High initiative, strong technical capability, and a willingness to deepen expertise in Contentful.

These Will Help You Stand Out

Experience with Bootstrap, Ionic Framework, or GruntJS.Knowledge of additional headless CMS platforms such as Sanity or Strapi.Strong problem‑solving mindset and passion for continuous learning and modern development best practices.

We're excited to meet people who share our mission and can make an impact in a variety of ways. Don't hesitate to apply, even if you only meet the minimum requirements listed. Think about your transferable experiences and unique skills that make you stand out as someone who can bring new and exciting things to this role.
razon_evaluacion: Excelente match para rol Full-Stack Junior con tecnologías alineadas (JavaScript, React/Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, Git) y modalidad híbrida en zona preferida (GBA).

descripcion:
En 10Pines buscamos programadorxs con al menos 5 años de experiencia para sumar a nuestro equipo y construir software de calidad en un ambiente colaborativo, aportando tu visión y experiencia.
🌲Tenemos una cultura horizontal. Todos nuestros números son abiertos y nuestra gestión es participativa: todas las voces son importantes porque son las que nos permiten mejorar.⚖️ Buscamos tener un balance en nuestra vida profesional y personal: es por eso que la flexibilidad horaria es clave para 10Pines.📈Trabajamos en mejorar el día a día de la pinada, por eso contamos con ajustes salariales periódicos, posibilidad de cobrar parte del sueldo en dólares, vacaciones extendidas, tiempo para tareas de cuidado, licencias de xaternidad extendida, horas de asistencia a conferencias pagas, entre otros beneficios. Además, anualmente compartimos el 50% de las ganancias brutas de la empresa entre todes les pines.💪 Contamos con planes de carrera para el desarrollo profesional según las motivaciones de cada persona.
¿Cómo es un día típico en 10Pines?El mayor porcentaje de tu tiempo vas a estar trabajando junto con otras personas de 10Pines para alguno de nuestros clientes (tenemos tanto clientes locales como en el exterior). Dependiendo del cliente y del equipo, los proyectos pueden centrarse más en desarrollo backend, frontend, full-stack o mobile; es por eso que no buscamos especialistas en una tecnología sino personas que puedan adaptarse a distintos entornos de desarrollo de software.Además, dedicamos parte de nuestro tiempo a la gestión de empresa. Todxs podemos aportar desde nuestra experiencia e intereses a distintas áreas, como por ejemplo recruiting, ventas, mentoreo u onboarding.
¡Tenemos grandes desafíos profesionales y técnicos para encarar! ¿Querés saber más?Visitá nuestra página web: https://www.10pines.com/Y nuestro sitio de cultura: https://cultura.10pines.com
razon_evaluacion: La oferta requiere al menos 5 años de experiencia, nivel Senior, mientras que el candidato es junior. Aunque el stack tecnológico es compatible, el nivel de experiencia no coincide.

descripcion:
Oferta de empleo — Full Stack Developer Ssr/Sr 
Sobre Amaze En Amaze construimos tecnología de personalización de vídeo a escala para que grandes marcas conviertan cada interacción en una experiencia relevante, medible y diferencial. Somos un entorno de alto crecimiento con estándares exigentes: aquí se trabaja con foco en calidad, velocidad de entrega y ownership. Nos importa tanto el “qué” (la experiencia del usuario) como el “cómo” (arquitectura ágil, mantenibilidad y performance bajo alta concurrencia).
🎯 Tu misión 
Construir y desplegar experiencias interactivas de principio a fin que conectan nuestra tecnología con millones de usuarios: desde la interfaz visual y la experiencia de usuario, hasta la lógica de negocio y las integraciones que las soportan. Queremos a alguien que disfrute entregando valor rápido y adaptándose a proyectos dinámicos con clientes, sin negociar la excelencia técnica.
🧩 Qué harás en el día a día
Desarrollar aplicaciones web y flujos interactivos full-stack (frontend + backend) con calidad y velocidad.Colaborar con producto/diseño para aterrizar requisitos de clientes en soluciones simples, escalables y atractivas.Diseñar e implementar APIs y servicios (integraciones de datos de clientes, autenticación, conexión con nuestro motor core).Asegurar la performance y resiliencia de las aplicaciones para soportar picos masivos de tráfico.Escribir código limpio y reutilizable, estandarizando componentes para acelerar futuras entregas.Participar en decisiones técnicas ágiles: elegir los mejores patrones, tooling e integraciones para sacar proyectos robustos a tiempo.Aportar a la cultura de entrega continua: automatización de despliegues y foco en fiabilidad.
✅ Requisitos (must-have)
Experiencia sólida como desarrollador/a full-stack, con nivel Semi-Senior o Senior, idealmente en agencias, startups o proyectos de iteración rápida.Dominio sólido de frontend moderno (SPA) y de buenas prácticas de UX/UI implementable preferentemente de React / Next.js.Dominio de backend en Node.js/Nest.js (creación de APIs, bases de datos, integraciones de terceros).Experiencia trabajando con Git, code reviews y ciclos de entrega muy frecuentes.Orientación a calidad visual y técnica: performance web y manejo de concurrencia.Mentalidad de ownership: te haces cargo de tu proyecto de punta a punta (desarrollo, despliegue, bugs, monitoreo).
🌟 Se valora especialmente (nice-to-have)
Experiencia con cloud y despliegues ágiles (Docker, AWS, Digital Ocean, etc).Experiencia previa en campañas digitales, e-commerce o productos con alto volumen y picos de tráfico estacionales.Conocimiento de herramientas de maquetación/animación (Tailwind CSS, etc)Capacidad de interpretar diseños en Figma e implementarlos con fidelidad visualSensibilidad por las métricas de negocio y la conversión del usuario.
🤝 Cómo trabajamosCultura de autonomía con responsabilidad: libertad para construir, rigor para sostener.Dinamismo y colaboración real entre diseño, ingeniería y clientes.Priorizamos claridad, estándares y entrega continua. Menos burocracia, más impacto directo en el usuario.
razon_evaluacion: La oferta requiere nivel Semi-Senior o Senior, excediendo el perfil junior del candidato. Aunque el stack tecnológico (React, Node.js, Figma) es compatible, el nivel de experiencia solicitado no coincide.

descripcion:
Svitla Systems Inc. is looking for a Full Stack TypeScript/JavaScript Developer with Node.js for a full-time remote position (40 hours per week) in Argentina. Our client is building next-generation AI infrastructure for law firms, a multi-tenant SaaS platform powered by LLM agents and cloud native architecture that automates real-world legal workflows. They are transforming an entire industry through intelligent automation. It is an opportunity to join early, help shape the platform's foundation, and make a real impact as the company scales.

You'll help build and grow a production AI platform from the ground up. You will ship fast, influence architecture decisions, and see your work used by real customers every day. It is a true builder role with high ownership, rapid growth, and meaningful equity in what we are creating together.

Requirements

Strong experience with TypeScript/JavaScript and Node.js. Experience designing and consuming APIs. Extensive knowledge of PostgreSQL (schemas, queries, performance). Knowledge of MongoDB. Understanding of building and running production systems on AWS. Be comfortable with Git workflows and agile tools like Jira, and have familiarity with CI/CD pipelines Ownership mindset and ability to work independently in a small team. Strong attention to detail and clear, effective communication skills. Fast learner and proactive individual. Excellent communication skills in English. You will work directly with some clients, so you need to read the documentation correctly.

Nice To Have

Experience with prompt engineering and LLM-based applications. Experience leveraging AI-assisted development tools (e.g., Cursor, Claude Code) to accelerate coding, testing, and workflow automation. Hands-on experience with Amazon Bedrock. Familiarity with AI-driven workflows, agents, or document automation. Experience building SaaS products for regulated or professional services industries. Startup or early-stage product experience. 

Responsibilities

Build and maintain full-stack applications using TypeScript/JavaScript and Node.js. Design and implement RESTful APIs that power workflow automation with integration to legal software, Office 365, and Gmail. Design, optimize, and maintain data models in PostgreSQL and MongoDB. Build and operate scalable services on AWS. Collaborate using Git and Jira in an agile, fast-moving environment. Work closely with the product to turn real law-firm workflows into reliable software. Improve system performance, scalability, and reliability. 

WE OFFER

US and EU projects based on advanced technologies.Competitive compensation based on skills and experience.Comprehensive private medical insurance.Regular performance appraisals to support your growth.Flexibility in workspace, either remote, our welcoming office or local coworking.Bonuses for recommendations of new employees.Bonuses for article writing, public talks, other activities.15 vacation days, 10 national holidays, 10 sick leaves.Personalized learning program tailored to your interests and skill development.Free tech webinars and meetups organized by Svitla.Fun corporate online\offline celebrations and activities.Well-established remote culture.Awesome team, friendly and supportive community!
razon_evaluacion: Excelente match para rol Full Stack Junior con tecnologías alineadas (TypeScript/JavaScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS, Git) y modalidad remota. Requiere nivel junior y stack coincide con perfil del candidato.

titulo: Analista de Cuentas Corrientes y Facturación - Boedo
descripcion:
Analista de Cuentas Corrientes y Facturación
 Zona Boedo - CABA
¿Te interesa desarrollarte en un rol administrativo con impacto directo en el negocio? Buscamos una persona con mirada integral del proceso comercial y administrativo de post venta.
Desde Potenciarnos - Capital Humano acompañamos a una empresa en la incorporación de un/a Analista de Cuentas Corrientes y Facturación, con foco en el control, análisis y seguimiento del circuito administrativo-comercial.
 ¿Cuáles serán tus principales responsabilidades?
Realizar el seguimiento de cuentas corrientes, incluyendo conciliaciones, imputación de pagos y control de saldos pendientes.
Asegurar la correcta registración y trazabilidad de la documentación vinculada a ventas (pedidos, remitos, facturas y recibos).
Analizar condiciones comerciales y gestionar ajustes.
Brindar soporte a clientes ante consultas o diferencias en cuentas, colaborando en su resolución.
Acompañar el circuito completo desde la operación comercial hasta la cobranza.
 ¿Qué perfil buscamos? 
Formación en curso o finalizada en carreras como Administración, Contabilidad o similares.
Experiencia previa de al menos 2 años en roles administrativos, idealmente vinculados a facturación o cuentas corrientes.
Buen manejo de herramientas informáticas, especialmente Excel y sistemas de gestión (ERP).
Conocimiento general de circuitos administrativos y documentación asociada a operaciones comerciales.
Comprensión básica de aspectos impositivos relacionados con la facturación.
Nos orientamos a perfiles metódicos, con capacidad de análisis y foco en la precisión de la información
 Valoraremos especialmente:
Capacidad para detectar inconsistencias y desvíos en los procesos.
Buen manejo de relaciones interpersonales, con foco en el cliente.
Organización y precisión en la gestión de información.
 Condiciones de la posición:
Jornada full time, de lunes a viernes de 9 a 18 hs (modalidad presencial).
Contratación efectiva y directa por empresa.
Posibilidades de desarrollo y crecimiento dentro de la compañía.
 Si te interesa sumarte a un rol con impacto transversal en la operatoria del negocio, ¡te estamos buscando!
 Postulate y avanzá en tu desarrollo profesional

titulo: Administrativo/a Comercial / Comercio Exterior / Presencial / CABA Centro - Minimo 2 años de experiencia
descripcion:
Administrativo/a Comercial – Comercio Exterior | CABA Centro

Importante empresa del rubro Comercio Exterior se encuentra en la búsqueda de un/a Administrativo/a Comercial para incorporarse a su equipo de trabajo en sus oficinas ubicadas en CABA Centro. La posición está orientada a profesionales con experiencia en el sector, perfil analítico-comercial y capacidad para gestionar cotizaciones, relaciones con clientes y seguimiento de oportunidades de negocio dentro del ámbito de la logística internacional y el comercio exterior.
La persona seleccionada tendrá un rol clave en el soporte al área comercial, colaborando en la elaboración de propuestas de servicios, el seguimiento de cotizaciones y la gestión de vínculos con clientes actuales y potenciales, contribuyendo al desarrollo y posicionamiento de la empresa en el mercado.

Principales responsabilidades
Armado y envío de cotizaciones de servicios a clientes actuales y potenciales.
Seguimiento comercial de las cotizaciones enviadas y gestión de oportunidades.
Revisión y actualización de condiciones comerciales con clientes (ajustes por inflación, terminales, nuevos servicios, entre otros).
Preparación de presentaciones comerciales y material de soporte para clientes.
Realización de demostraciones o presentaciones de los servicios ofrecidos por la empresa.
Actualización de condiciones comerciales en las fichas de clientes dentro del sistema.
Desarrollo y mantenimiento de relaciones comerciales con clientes.
Participación y promoción de la empresa en eventos del sector.
Colaboración en acciones de marketing, relaciones públicas y fidelización de clientes.

Requisitos
Secundario completo (preferentemente con orientación técnica).
Experiencia en posiciones administrativas y/o comerciales dentro del rubro comercio exterior, logística internacional, despachantes de aduana o agentes de carga.
Conocimiento general de la operatoria de comercio exterior (deseable).
Manejo avanzado de Excel y paquete Office.
Buen manejo de herramientas informáticas.
Conocimiento del sistema DUX (deseable).
Perfil con buenas habilidades de comunicación, orientación al cliente y capacidad para detectar necesidades comerciales.

Condiciones de contratación
Modalidad de trabajo: Presencial 100%
Lugar de trabajo: CABA Centro.
Horario: Lunes a viernes de 9:00 a 18:00 hs.
Modalidad de contratación: Efectiva bajo Relación de dependencia.
Remuneración: A convenir, acorde a experiencia y expectativas del mercado.

Se ofrece la posibilidad de integrarse a una empresa en crecimiento dentro del sector de comercio exterior, con un entorno profesional dinámico y oportunidades de desarrollo.
Si contás con experiencia en el rubro y te interesa formar parte de un equipo orientado al servicio y al desarrollo comercial, te invitamos a postularte.

We are building a Lead SAP Automation Tester role to strengthen SAP QA across FS-CD, FS-RI, SAP Business Partner (BP), Workflow, and FI-GL.

You will drive test automation using SAP TOSCA and SAP Solution Manager (SolMan), align coverage with end-to-end business flows and integrations, and help the team deliver reliable releases—apply now.

Responsibilities

Deliver quality assurance outcomes by applying testing practices that support high-standard solution releases
Coordinate with a distributed QA team and contribute to ongoing team improvements
Build and execute automation frameworks and test scripts to improve quality and efficiency
Analyze end-to-end business processes across SAP modules and integrations to ensure appropriate testing coverage
Prepare and run detailed test plans, test cases, and scenarios aligned with project goals
Record test results clearly and support user acceptance testers (UAT) to enable smooth UAT execution
Detect and log defects, partner with development teams on resolution, and recommend preventive measures
Communicate with stakeholders to maintain alignment and transparency on testing activities
Review and enhance QA processes, tools, and methodologies based on project needs
Contribute to quality risk assessments and provide actionable input to reduce risk

Requirements

Proven track record with 5+ years of overall experience in SAP QA roles, including exposure to FS-CD, FS-RI, SAP BP, Workflow, and FI-GL modules
Hands-on experience with SAP TOSCA Automation Tool and SAP Solution Manager (SolMan), including supporting the creation and upkeep of test cases/scripts
Solid background in Property & Casualty (P&C) insurance or similar domains, with active participation in QA or Business Analysis functions
Working knowledge of SAP BAPI/RFC and integration with upstream applications such as Guidewire or similar systems
Demonstrated ability to develop and review test plans, scenarios, test cases, and perform bug/defect analysis
Practical understanding of SAP ChaRM
Upper-Intermediate English proficiency (B2)

This role focuses on advancing automation, delivering high-quality solutions, and collaborating with stakeholders to ensure alignment with business processes and integrations.

Responsibilities

Contribute to quality assurance efforts by implementing testing practices that ensure delivery of high-standard solutions
Collaborate within a distributed QA team and support its continuous improvement efforts
Assist in the development and execution of automation frameworks and test scripts to enhance quality and efficiency
Understand end-to-end business processes across SAP modules and integrations to provide adequate testing coverage
Support the creation and execution of detailed test plans, cases, and scenarios while ensuring alignment with project goals
Document test results comprehensively and assist user acceptance testers (UAT), promoting seamless UAT processes
Identify and report defects, collaborating with development teams for resolution and suggesting preventive measures
Communicate effectively with stakeholders to ensure alignment and transparency regarding testing activities
Participate in the evaluation and improvement of QA processes, tools, and methodologies in response to project needs
Contribute to risk assessments for potential quality concerns, providing actionable input to minimize risks

Requirements

3+ years of overall experience in SAP QA roles with exposure to FS-CD, FS-RI, SAP BP, Workflow, and FI-GL modules
Competency in SAP TOSCA Automation Tool and SAP Solution Manager (SolMan), with the ability to assist in the creation and maintenance of test cases/scripts
Experience in Property & Casualty (P&C) insurance or similar domains with active involvement in QA or Business Analysis functions
Familiarity with SAP BAPI/RFC and integration with upstream applications like Guidewire or similar systems
Showcase of skills in developing and reviewing test plans, scenarios, cases, and bug/defect analysis
Knowledge of SAP ChaRM
Upper-Intermediate English language proficiency (B2)

¡Sé parte de Stefanini!

En Stefanini somos más de 30.000 genios, conectados desde 41 países, haciendo lo que les apasiona y co-creando un futuro mejor.

Responsabilidades y atribuciones

Diseñe, desarrolle y ejecute scripts de prueba automatizados utilizando herramientas de automatización estándar de la industria.

titulo: Senior QA Tester - Playwright / TypeScript - Argentina (Buenos Aires - Hybrid)
descripcion:
Updated: March 23, 2026
Location: Buenos Aires, B, Argentina
Job ID: 25105862

Not ready to apply?
Join our Talent Network

Description

Senior QA Tester - Playwright / TypeScript - Argentina (Buenos Aires - Hybrid)

Syneos Health® is a leading fully-integrated life sciences services organization built to accelerate customer success. We partner with innovators at every point across the drug development and commercialization continuum, helping them navigate complexity, anticipate change and accelerate progress.

Every day we perform better because of how we work together, as one team, each the best at what we do. We bring together talented experts across a broad spectrum of business critical corporate functions. Every role plays an essential part in enabling our customers to achieve their goals. Our teams are agile, collaborative, and committed to delivering—for each other, for our customers, and ultimately for the people who rely on the services we support.
Discover what your 25,000 future colleagues already know:

Why Syneos Health
• We are passionate about developing our people, through career development and progression; supportive and engaged line management; technical and therapeutic area training; peer recognition and total rewards program.
• We are committed to building an inclusive culture – where you can authentically be yourself. Central to this is our purpose – Driven to Deliver – which captures the passion of our colleagues to show up each day and shape solutions that have the ability to dramatically impact someone’s life.
• We are continuously building the company we all want to work for and our customers want to work with. Why? Because we know that when we bring together smart colleagues from across the world, we can shape the future of healthcare, driving impact for customers and defining the pace of patient progress.

Job Responsibilities

Position Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled Senior QA Tester/Test Automation Engineer to design, develop, and maintain automation solutions across multiple applications and platforms. The ideal candidate is passionate about quality engineering, experienced in modern automation frameworks, and capable of driving automation adoption in agile delivery environments.

This role will play a key part in increasing automation coverage, improving release quality, reducing testing cycle times, and ensuring a scalable and reliable automation approach across the organization.

Key Responsibilities

Automation Development

Design and build automated test scripts for web, API, backend, and functional scenarios.
Develop scalable automation suites aligned to sprint and release cycles.
Contribute to reusable automation libraries, utilities, and test data components.
Ensure automation scripts meet coding standards and trace back to clear requirements.

Continuous Quality Execution

Support CI/CD integration for automated testing execution.
Configure automation execution pipelines and generate automated reports.
Use automation results to proactively identify defects and quality trends.

Test Strategy & Collaboration

Work closely with product owners, dev teams, and QA analysts to define test coverage.
Perform requirement analysis to identify automation scope early (shift-left approach).
Participate in sprint ceremonies and represent automation within the delivery team.
Provide estimation and effort planning for automation tasks.

Documentation & Governance

Maintain script versioning, execution logs, and documentation.
Support traceability, risk-based testing, and validation evidence where applicable.

Required Qualifications

2–5 years of hands-on experience in automation engineering.
Strong hands-on experience in at least one of the following:
Playwright
Selenium
Cypress
Provar (for Salesforce projects)
Strong scripting/programming skills in:
TypeScript / JavaScript
or
Java / Python
Experience with API automation tools (e.g., Postman, RestAssured).
Solid understanding of CI/CD platforms such as Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, or Jenkins.
Experience executing automation within agile delivery models.
Good knowledge of test design techniques (boundary, equivalence, data-driven, risk-based testing).

Preferred Experience

Experience automating Salesforce applications (e.g., Health Cloud, Data Cloud, Lightning UI).
Hands-on experience building reusable automation frameworks.
Knowledge of performance or accessibility automation tools.
Experience in a regulated or validated environment (e.g., GxP).
ISTQB or QA-related certification.
Exposure to cloud environments (AWS, Azure).

Soft Skills

Strong analytical thinking and troubleshooting skills.
Excellent verbal and written communication.
Self-driven with strong ownership and accountability.
Able to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams.
Passionate about mentoring others on automation best practices.

Get to know Syneos Health

Over the past 5 years, we have worked with 94% of all Novel FDA Approved Drugs, 95% of EMA Authorized Products and over 200 Studies across 73,000 Sites and 675,000+ Trial patients.

No matter what your role is, you’ll take the initiative and challenge the status quo with us in a highly competitive and ever-changing environment. Learn more about Syneos Health.

http://www.syneoshealth.com

Additional Information

Tasks, duties, and responsibilities as listed in this job description are not exhaustive. The Company, at its sole discretion and with no prior notice, may assign other tasks, duties, and job responsibilities. Equivalent experience, skills, and/or education will also be considered so qualifications of incumbents may differ from those listed in the Job Description. The Company, at its sole discretion, will determine what constitutes as equivalent to the qualifications described above. Further, nothing contained herein should be construed to create an employment contract. Occasionally, required skills/experiences for jobs are expressed in brief terms. Any language contained herein is intended to fully comply with all obligations imposed by the legislation of each country in which it operates, including the implementation of the EU Equality Directive, in relation to the recruitment and employment of its employees. The Company is committed to compliance with the Americans with Disabilities Act, including the provision of reasonable accommodations, when appropriate, to assist employees or applicants to perform the essential functions of the job.

Summary

The Sr. QA Engineer is a key contributor within the Quality Engineer track, responsible for executing QA automated testing. This role applies risk-based testing to prioritize efforts, ensures GxP compliance where required, and practices shift-left testing by engaging early in the SDLC. Practitioners actively contribute to automation and mentor junior testers.

titulo: QA Manual – Medios de Pago (Híbrido – CABA)l
descripcion:
Buscamos un/a *Tester especializado/a en medios de pago* para participar en procesos de homologación de *servicios de POS (posnet)*, validando la correcta implementación de mensajería financiera basada en *ISO 8583*.

La persona seleccionada trabajará en la validación funcional y técnica de integraciones de pagos, verificando reglas de mensajería, estructuras de datos y flujos transaccionales.

La posición requiere *capacidad analítica, autonomía y atención al detalle*, trabajando en coordinación con equipos técnicos y funcionales.

*Responsabilidades*

* Validar la correcta implementación de mensajería bajo estándar *ISO 8583*.
* Realizar pruebas funcionales y técnicas sobre integraciones de *POS / medios de pago*.
* Analizar estructuras de mensajes y reglas de negocio asociadas a transacciones.
* Validar integraciones basadas en *APIs, XML y JSON*.
* Realizar consultas y validaciones en *bases de datos SQL*.
* Documentar resultados de pruebas e incidencias detectadas.
* Colaborar con equipos técnicos en la resolución de problemas durante el proceso de homologación.

*Requisitos*

* Experiencia trabajando con *mensajería ISO 8583*.
* Conocimientos de *XML, JSON y APIs*.
* Conocimientos de *SQL / bases de datos*.
* Conocimiento de *Java*.
* Buen manejo de *Excel*.
* Capacidad analítica y orientación al detalle.

*Se valorará*

* Experiencia en *tokenización* en medios de pago.
* Conocimientos básicos de *Linux*.
* Nivel de *inglés intermedio*.
* Capacidad de trabajo en equipo y autonomía en la gestión de tareas.

*Modalidad de trabajo*

Modalidad híbrida:

* *3 días Home Office*
* *2 días presenciales en oficinas del cliente – Parque Patricios, Polo Tecnológíco (CABA)*

*Compensación*

Salario competitivo acorde a experiencia.
Los detalles salariales se informarán durante el proceso de selección.

Si te interesa participar en proyectos vinculados al ecosistema de *medios de pago y POS*, te invitamos a postularte.

Sueldo: $2.000.000,00 - $3.500.000,00 al mes



Pregunta(s) de postulación:
* ¿Has participado en procesos de homologación o testing de POS / medios de pago? Describe brevemente.
* ¿Qué nivel de experiencia tienes trabajando con SQL para validación de datos?
* ¿Has trabajado con APIs, XML o JSON en procesos de testing o integración?
* ¿Tienes disponibilidad para trabajar en modalidad híbrida en Parque Patricios (CABA)?
* ¿Tu remuneración bruta mensual pretendida está dentro del rango de la publicación?
* ¿con cuáles tipos de mensaje has trabajado en mensajería ISO 8583?

Experiencia:
* ISO 8583: 1 año (Obligatorio)

Lugar de trabajo: Híbrido en Parque Patricios, Buenos Aires

The Data Quality Assurance Analyst works closely with business partners and the development team to ensure applications meet business requirements and are free of major defects. This role is responsible for test case creation & execution, defect lifecycle management, reporting status, and utilize test automation.

Primary Job Accountabilities/Responsibilities

Work closely with business partners in understanding user needs, project scope, and deliverables
Manage different phases of testing as needed (unit, functional, integration, user acceptance, regression, and performance/load)
Innovate solutions to problems while following established processes. Senior teammates are still needed to provide oversight on solutions to complex problems.

Quality Assurance

Create and execute test cases according to test approach; Obtain or create test data as needed; Obtain business approval for test results; Provide daily updates
Contribute to all agile/scrum rituals
Contribute to the improvement of the testing process
Provide test cases for User Acceptance Testing (UAT) or regression as needed
Work with UAT on reported issues
Develop ad hoc queries and reports based on the needs of the business and technical teams
Manage defects reported in production and during the QA testing phase against requirements and system standards
Participate in team defect reviews, provide root cause where possible
Leverage test automation
Mentor and train testers on test tools & process

Data Quality

Develop, test, code review, and implement data quality rules for applicable data quality dimensions (accuracy, completeness, validity, consistency, uniqueness, timeliness, integrity, and reasonability)
Leverage the existing data quality framework
Review and optimize SQL code
May be allocated 25% to Business Analyst activities including gathering and clarifying requirements

Basic Qualifications

Bachelor of Science in a related field or equivalent work experience
Advanced level of english
2 years of IT QA Experience
Experience with programming languages
Experience with test automation tools (Selenium, Pytest, etc.)
Experience with data repositories/data warehouse
Experience with SDLC in Enterprise applications

Preferred Experience

Strong SQL, experience working with large volume of data (MS SQL Server)
Experience testing LLM chatbot/RAG, NLP, GenAI, or Machine Learning (ML)
Knowledge of LLM, RAG, and ML concepts
Experience with test automation framework
Experience with Python. R/Scala/C++/Java helpful
Experience with API testing, Prompt Engineering
Experience with Azure Databricks/DevOps
Knowledge of Data Lake, Data Lakehouse, Data Pipelines
Familiar with MS Fabric, Unity Catalog, medallion lakehouse architecture
Lead experience
Experience with Business Analyst role

Monks has an open position for a talented production designer who wants to further their skills in digital asset and content design at our Buenos Aires office.

In this middle-level role, you will join a dedicated global team in producing top quality content for the product interfaces of one of the world's most recognizable brands.

Role & Responsibilities

In this role, you'll specialize in the design of static visuals for a wide variety of channels, including product interfaces, social media, and display advertising.
You work as part of a dedicated global team of designers, illustrators, animators, editors, and art directors that produces world-class work across time zones.
The job is about harmonizing speed, style, and scale to produce loads of good-looking assets at a steady pace.
Pixel-perfection is important. You safeguard quality at all times and work together with QA testers.
In addition to making images look so good you'll want to lick them, you make sure that designs adhere to guidelines and are consistent across ad formats, dimensions, and languages.
You will work together directly with art directors on the client side, representing Monks from a design POV.

Please be attentive to the requirements for this role and accompany your portfolio with a short cover letter detailing why you're the right person for the job.

Requirements

For this role, we're looking for a designer with around 2 years of experience crafting digital ads and assets.
You have solid Photoshop and Illustrator skills. Sketch or Figma skills are a bonus.
Mastering the art of silhouetting and retouching is a plus.
You know how to keep your files, layers, and folders super-organized, even if you're a creative mess outside of Photoshop.
You can take charge of small tasks independently and take on bigger jobs with little supervision.

Company Description

An Enterprise client is seeking a detail-oriented QA Manual Tester to ensure the quality, usability, and performance of mobile applications across iOS and Android platforms. This contract role will work closely with developers and product managers to identify defects, validate new features, and deliver a seamless user experience for a global user base.

The engagement is expected to last 6–12 months, with the possibility of extension. This role supports EST business hours, with an anticipated start date of January 19, and multiple hires will be made.

Job Description

Execute comprehensive manual testing, including functional, regression, UI/UX, and smoke testing across a variety of iOS and Android devices.
Identify, document, and track software defects using tools such as Jira, providing clear and reproducible steps.
Create, maintain, and execute detailed test plans and test cases based on product requirements and acceptance criteria.
Validate cross-platform functionality to ensure consistent performance across different OS versions, devices, and screen sizes.
Collaborate with developers and product managers by participating in sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and QA estimation discussions.
Perform user-centric testing to identify usability issues and experience gaps beyond strictly technical defects.

Qualifications

5+ years of hands-on experience in manual testing for mobile applications (native, hybrid, or web-based).
Strong understanding of iOS Human Interface Guidelines and Android Material Design principles.
Proficiency with mobile debugging and logging tools such as Charles Proxy, Fiddler, Xcode Console, or Android Studio Logcat.
Basic experience testing RESTful APIs using tools like Postman to validate backend data and integrations.
Experience testing on both physical devices and emulators/simulators, including platforms such as BrowserStack or Firebase Test Lab.
Excellent analytical skills, strong attention to detail, a proactive “breaker” mindset, and the ability to clearly communicate technical issues to non-technical stakeholders.

Additional Information

This is a fully remote work opportunity, allowing candidates to work from any location while supporting EST business hours.

The role offers a competitive hourly pay rate, commensurate with experience and skill level.

Who We Are

Launchpad Technologies Inc. is a global technology partner connecting top talent with high-impact projects across North America and beyond. We specialize in Staff Augmentation and product development, helping companies scale with agility while empowering professionals to grow in meaningful, remote-first environments.

We're looking for a ServiceNow Tester to join a growing ServiceNow team at one of our major customers. This is a great opportunity for a mid-level QA who enjoys hands-on testing and wants to grow into automation, helping build and mature the QA practice for the ServiceNow platform. You'll start with a strong focus on manual testing, gradually taking ownership of test automation using ServiceNow ATF, in close collaboration with Product Owners, Developers, and Business Systems Analysts.

 Start date: ASAP
 Contract type: Contractor, Full-Time, Remote
 Work hours: Monday to Friday, 8 am to 5 pm PST

What You'll Be Doing
Execute manual testing for ServiceNow applications, mainly ITSM and CSM
Develop and maintain test cases and test plans
Identify, document, and track defects using QA tools
Perform regression testing to ensure platform stability
Collaborate with POs and stakeholders to understand requirements
Support User Acceptance Testing (UAT)
Begin designing and implementing automated tests using ServiceNow ATF
Contribute to improving QA processes and best practices
What You Need to Succeed
Must-haves
3+ years of experience in Software Quality Assurance
Hands-on experience testing ServiceNow (any module)
Strong background in manual testing
Experience or working knowledge of ServiceNow Automated Testing Framework (ATF)
Familiarity with test case management and defect tracking tools
Good communication skills and ability to work collaboratively in a distributed team
Nice-to-haves
Experience with Selenium or other automation tools
ServiceNow certification
Experience working in Agile environments
Exposure to large-scale or enterprise platforms
Our Recruitment Process

Initial Interview – 60 minutes with our Talent Acquisition Specialist

Why Join Launchpad?

We believe that great work starts with great people. At Launchpad, we offer:

 Fully remote work with hardware provided
 Global team experience with clients in North America
 Competitive USD compensation
 Training and learning stipends
 Paid Time Off (vacation, personal, study)
‍♂️ A culture that values autonomy, purpose, and human connection

Compliance & Equal Opportunity

Launchpad is an equal opportunity employer committed to creating an inclusive environment for all applicants. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other protected status under applicable laws in Canada and British Columbia.

All candidate information will be handled confidentially and used solely for recruitment purposes in accordance with applicable privacy regulations.

Remote (LATAM)
