About us

Ruby Labs is a leading tech company that creates and operates innovative consumer products. We offer a diverse range of opportunities across the health, education, and entertainment industries. Our innovative teams are driving the future of consumer-led products, and we're always looking for passionate individuals to join us. Learn more about our story at: https://rubylabs.com/about-us/

About the role

At RubyLabs, we’re seeking a Senior AI Engineer (Node.js / Next.js / TypeScript) to shape our AI infrastructure and drive production-ready LLM experiences. You’ll work in a modern stack, making data-driven decisions around model performance, reliability, and cost.

You’ll own advanced prompt systems, structured outputs, and complex LLM workflows using LangChain or LlamaIndex. Observability, debugging, and evaluation are core to the role, leveraging Langfuse and AI gateways like OpenRouter to continuously improve model quality and operational efficiency. You’ll take full ownership of key AI features from experimentation to live production.

Key Responsibilities

Advanced Prompt Engineering: Designing complex, dynamic prompt templates with conditional logic and efficiently reusing information and context within prompts to maximize generation quality and reasoning.

Structured Outputs & Schemas: Implementing various response schemes (JSON mode, function calling, Zod/JSON schemas) to ensure AI outputs are predictable and ready for seamless integration into application logic.

Prompt Engineering & Evaluations: Building robust evaluation pipelines and using Langfuse to collect feedback and score the quality of responses in real time.

Tracing & Debugging: Performing deep debugging of complex LLM chains using Langfuse traces to identify bottlenecks and optimize for cost, latency, and context window usage.

AI A/B Testing: Running systematic experiments across different models via OpenRouter (e.g., comparing Claude 3.5 Sonnet vs. GPT-4o) and analyzing results based on quantitative metrics.

Data-Driven Decisions: Making deployment decisions for new prompts or models strictly based on quantitative benchmarks and trace data, rather than intuition.

Output Scoring & Analysis: Developing scoring systems to analyze the “Problem Solution” chain and identify root causes of hallucinations or logic errors using Langfuse analytics.

Model Performance & Fine-Tuning: Regularly re-evaluating model performance as new architectures emerge and performing fine-tuning when necessary to meet specific domain requirements.

Qualifications

Node.js & Next.js: Deep knowledge of the stack to build reliable services and handle complex LLM-generated data.

Dynamic Prompting Skills: Proven experience in building prompts where content is highly dependent on input variables and context injection.

OpenRouter Experience: Experience working with unified APIs, managing rate limits, and selecting the most cost-effective models for specific tasks.

Langfuse (or similar): Understanding of LLM observability principles — setting up tracing, creating test datasets, and integrating scoring systems.

Evaluation Methodology: Experience with frameworks like RAGAS or building custom “LLM-as-a-judge” systems.

Analytical Mindset: Ability to transform raw generation logs into actionable business metrics and technical insights.

Iterative Mindset: Focus on continuous product improvement through constant feedback loops.

Nice to have

Fine-Tuning: Practical experience in fine-tuning models for specific domain tasks or JSON compliance.

RAG Architecture: Understanding how to build and optimize Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems, including indexing, retrieval, and re-ranking.

Python: Basic knowledge for working with data science scripts or AI evaluation libraries.

Location

Ruby Labs operates within the CET (Central European Time) zone. Applicants from any country are welcome to apply for the position as long as they are located within approximately ± 4 hours of CET. This ensures optimal collaboration and communication during working hours.

Benefits

Discover the perks of being part of our vibrant team! We offer:

Remote Work Environment: Embrace the freedom to work from anywhere, anytime, promoting a healthy work-life balance.

Unlimited PTO: Enjoy unlimited paid time off to recharge and prioritize your well-being, without counting days.

Paid National Holidays: Celebrate and relax on national holidays with paid time off to unwind and recharge.

Company-provided MacBook: Experience seamless productivity with top-notch Apple MacBooks provided to all employees who need them.

Flexible Independent Contractor Agreement: Unlock the benefits of flexibility, autonomy, and entrepreneurial opportunities. Benefit from tax advantages, networking opportunities, reduced employment obligations, and the freedom to work from anywhere. Read more about it here: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1tzxGX4Uu7Ts_HCLFXESKLnKaaBfVCPf1f9AYZPrkjJM/preview?tab=t.0

Be part of our fast-growing team and seize this excellent opportunity for personal and professional growth!

Interview Process

After submitting your application, we conduct a thorough review which typically takes 3 to 5 days, but may occasionally take longer due to the volume of applications received. If we see a potential fit, we proceed with the following steps:

Recruiter Screening (40 minutes)

Technical Interview (60 minutes)

Final Interview (30 minutes)

Life at Ruby Labs

At Ruby Labs, we move fast, aim high, and expect the same from our team. We’re not here to play small—we’re here to build, grow, and win. That means we look for people who are ambitious, driven, and ready to give their best every single day.

This is a place for individuals who thrive under pressure, embrace challenges, and see opportunity in every obstacle. If you’re hungry to achieve, motivated by impact, and want to grow at the speed of your own ambition, Ruby Labs offers the platform to make it happen.

Here, effort is matched with reward. We recognize those who go all in and deliver results, and we create space for people who want more—more responsibility, more growth, and more success.

What we are building

Mimica's mission is to empower enterprises, teams, and individuals to reclaim their most precious resource — time and work more efficiently, with greater purpose and impact.

Our AI-powered task mining observes employee actions across the desktop and categorizes them into detailed process maps. Mimica’s process intelligence highlights inefficiencies, prioritizes improvements based on ROI, recommends the optimal technology for automation (RPA, intelligent document processing, GenAI), and provides a blueprint for building new automations and transforming work.

Where we are in our scale-up journey

We’ve achieved strong product-market fit and are now scaling with intention. You’ll join a 45-person team of Senior+ engineers and Product leaders who prioritise product impact over mere headcount. We have 8 cross-functional teams, including a dedicated Platform team focused on infra & developer experience. We started building proprietary ML before the LLM boom, so we don't just consume models - we train them from the ground up.

Our approach to engineering

We prioritize customer needs first

We work in small, project-based teams

We have flexibility in terms of the problems we work on

We own the full lifecycle of our projects

We avoid silos and encourage taking up tasks in new areas

We balance quality and velocity

We have a shared responsibility for our production code

We each set our own routine to maximize our productivity

Your mission

In this role, your mission will be to improve and expand the capabilities of the Mimica Webapp (MERN stack). This means designing a robust architecture, developing new features, releasing improvements to existing components and taking operational responsibility for what you build. You will seek to understand user needs and pain points, experiment and iterate on your solutions, leveraging tight feedback loops.

You‘ll have the opportunity to shape our technical direction, processes and culture.

Part of your day-to-day

Developing a visualisation tool and a data-rich dashboard that display process flows and metrics in novel ways, with scalability in mind.

Building interfaces and real-time frontend services that enable multiple users to edit graph data and re-train AI models through their input.

Owning projects end-to-end as part of small teams, collaborating with our TLs and Product Managers.

Participating in architectural decisions, collaborating across teams to identify and implement product improvements and producing documentation for your implementations.

Providing feedback to peers through RFCs, code reviews and helping those around you to level up.

Participating in hiring and onboarding new team members; taking on end-to-end project management responsibilities as we grow.

Who you are

You have at least 8+ years of experience as a Software Engineer and high engineering standards.

Proven experience in architecting scalable and reusable UI components and algorithms that efficiently handle large datasets.

Experienced and comfortable with Redux and Node.js

Knowledge of advanced system design principles, data structures, algorithms, and the core concepts underlying scalable and reliable architectures.

Deep understanding of advanced performance optimisation techniques across front-end and backend.

Committed to upholding high engineering standards, delivering clean, testable, reusable, modular, and well-documented code.

Experience owning projects from start to finish, including speccing, design, development, testing, deployment, release and observ.

Drive to develop your skills, improve team processes and reduce debt.

Fluency in English, with effective communication skills – articulating complex ideas, concepts and trade-offs clearly.

Bonus

Background working in fast-paced, successful scale-up environments or as a founding engineer, with a track record of delivering value quickly and iteratively.

Job Title: Founding Engineer
Full-Stack Developer — Earned Wage Access Platform (WhatsApp + Fintech)
Location: Remote (Open to global candidates)
Contract: 3+ months (possible extension / full-time conversion)
About the Role

We’re building an innovative earned wage access platform that allows hourly workers to access a portion of their earned wages daily via WhatsApp, linked bank accounts, and stablecoin debit cards. We need a versatile full-stack developer to build our MVP and own end-to-end technical implementation.
You will be responsible for integrating Plaid for bank connections, WhatsApp Business API for conversational user flow, payment gateways for subscription management, wallet backend for daily advances and peer transfers, and card issuing integrations.
Our hope is to bring you on as the founding Engineer of our startup. Let’s build.
Responsibilities
Build secure OAuth integration with Plaid for bank account linking and transaction data retrieval.
Develop backend services to process user data, store sensitive info securely, and comply with financial regulations.
Implement WhatsApp Business API messaging flows, including automated interview chat and user notifications.
Design and build subscription payment flows using Stripe or similar gateways.
Integrate with crypto debit card issuing platforms (e.g., Marqeta, Stripe Issuing) for physical and virtual cards.
Build wallet infrastructure supporting daily wage advances, peer-to-peer transfers, and ACH debit/credit automation.
Implement scheduled jobs for daily advance payouts and payday repayments.
Ensure KYC/AML compliance integration, data privacy, and secure storage.
Build user onboarding and approval logic, including handling edge cases (failed payments, incomplete KYC, etc.).
Collaborate closely with product, design, and compliance teams to iterate rapidly.
Requirements
10+ years full-stack development experience, ideally in fintech or payments.
Strong backend skills with Node.js, Python, or similar.
Experience integrating Plaid or similar open banking APIs.
Hands-on experience with WhatsApp Business API or conversational messaging platforms.
Familiarity with payment gateway integration (Stripe, PayPal).
Experience with card issuing APIs (Marqeta, Stripe Issuing, or equivalent).
Knowledge of ACH payment flows and banking compliance is a strong plus.
Experience building wallet systems or working with crypto/blockchain wallets a plus.
Strong understanding of security best practices for sensitive financial data.
Comfortable working in a fast-paced startup environment with ambiguous requirements.
Excellent communication skills and ability to work remotely.
Bonus Points
Prior experience building earned wage access or payroll products.
Familiarity with AML/KYC tooling and compliance processes.
Experience with Twilio or other SMS/WhatsApp messaging APIs.
Knowledge of cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, Azure) and serverless architecture.
To Apply
Please send your resume, relevant project links (GitHub, portfolio), and a brief note on your fintech or messaging API experience.

Who We Are

At Kyndryl, we design, build, manage and modernize the mission-critical technology systems that the world depends on every day. So why work at Kyndryl? We are always moving forward – always pushing ourselves to go further in our efforts to build a more equitable, inclusive world for our employees, our customers and our communities.

The Role

Are you passionate about building backend systems that power real-world AI solutions? Do you thrive in fast-paced, high-impact environments? Then you might be the perfect fit for our GenAI-focused Backend Engineering team at Kyndryl Argentina.

As a Backend Developer – GenAI Projects at Kyndryl, you will be part of a high-performing, multidisciplinary team supporting one of our top financial services clients. You’ll be responsible for designing and implementing backend solutions that integrate with cutting-edge Generative AI technologies, delivering tangible business value across multiple domains.

You will work with cloud-based and on-prem LLM APIs, apply prompt engineering techniques, and orchestrate models using modern frameworks like LangChain and LangGraph. Your work will be critical in shaping how our client leverages GenAI to transform their operations.

You’ll collaborate with architects and SREs in CI/CD and cloud environments, contribute to continuous improvement initiatives, and explore new tools and approaches to AI development. If you’re autonomous, creative, and excited by emerging technologies, this is your opportunity to make a real impact.

Your Future at Kyndryl

This role opens the door to a career path rich with opportunities in AI and backend engineering. With dedication and innovation, you can grow into senior technical roles, contribute to strategic AI initiatives, and help shape the future of GenAI at Kyndryl and beyond.

Who You Are

You’re not only skilled—you’re curious, adaptable, and driven by problem-solving. You’re customer-focused and thrive in collaborative, inclusive environments.

Required Technical and Professional Experience

3+ years of experience in backend software development
Proficiency in Python or Node.js with TypeScript
Experience with relational databases (SQL)
Cloud experience with AWS or Azure
Experience with CI/CD pipelines and tools (e.g., GitLab)
Strong understanding of REST API design, MVC architecture, and backend development best practices
Familiarity with GenAI APIs (e.g., Bedrock, Azure OpenAI, Vertex AI)
Understanding of GenAI concepts: prompting, guardrails, LLMs vs. SLMs, vector embeddings

Preferred Technical and Professional Experience

Experience in AI projects (e.g., using TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn)
Experience with backend frameworks aligned with Python or Node.js (e.g., Flask, FastAPI, Express, NestJS)
Knowledge of vector databases (Qdrant, Pinecone, Weaviate, FAISS) for RAG solutions
Familiarity with GenAI orchestration frameworks (LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex)
Experience with containerization and API documentation tools (e.g., Docker, OpenAPI)
Exposure to full-stack development (e.g., Next.js or frontend integration)

Soft Skills

High adaptability to new technologies and environments
Self-sufficient and solution-oriented mindset
Resilience under pressure and in complex technical scenarios
Consultative and proactive approach with a focus on continuous improvement
Ability to manage multiple tasks and deliverables simultaneously
Creative problem-solving and lateral thinking in demanding contexts

Work Environment

Primarily remote work, with occasional visits to client or Kyndryl offices
Preferred location: Argentina / Buenos Aires
Daily communication in Spanish; technical English required for documentation and APIs

About the Team

You’ll join a growing technical and consultative team working closely with key client stakeholders to build their GenAI Center of Excellence. All projects are real-world, applied, and business-impact driven.

Interested?

Apply now and become part of a team that’s redefining how enterprises implement Generative AI—from architecture to real-world deployment.

Being You

Diversity is a whole lot more than what we look like or where we come from, it’s how we think and who we are. We welcome people of all cultures, backgrounds, and experiences. But we’re not doing it single-handily: Our Kyndryl Inclusion Networks are only one of many ways we create a workplace where all Kyndryls can find and provide support and advice. This dedication to welcoming everyone into our company means that Kyndryl gives you – and everyone next to you – the ability to bring your whole self to work, individually and collectively, and support the activation of our equitable culture. That’s the Kyndryl Way.

What You Can Expect

With state-of-the-art resources and Fortune 100 clients, every day is an opportunity to innovate, build new capabilities, new relationships, new processes, and new value. Kyndryl cares about your well-being and prides itself on offering benefits that give you choice, reflect the diversity of our employees and support you and your family through the moments that matter – wherever you are in your life journey. Our employee learning programs give you access to the best learning in the industry to receive certifications, including Microsoft, Google, Amazon, Skillsoft, and many more. Through our company-wide volunteering and giving platform, you can donate, start fundraisers, volunteer, and search over 2 million non-profit organizations. At Kyndryl, we invest heavily in you, we want you to succeed so that together, we will all succeed.

Get Referred!

If you know someone that works at Kyndryl, when asked ‘How Did You Hear About Us’ during the application process, select ‘Employee Referral’ and enter your contact's Kyndryl email address.

descripcion: ¿Qué hace la compañía?Startup perteneciente a un reconocido Laboratorio de fármacos. Desde 1997, brindan acceso a actualizaciones científicas y educación médica a través de su Campus Virtual para profesionales de la salud. Innovación. Confianza. Compromiso. Calidad.A nivel técnico: Mínimo 5 años de experiencia en roles de soporte IT y operaciones tecnológicas. (Excluyente). Residir en zonas aledañas a Olivos, Zona Norte, Buenos Aires (Excluyente). Experiencia en entornos corporativos medianos (entre 50 y 100 usuarios). Experiencia en atención de usuarios, gestión de incidentes y requerimientos mediante sistemas de tickets. Experiencia interactuando y coordinando con proveedores tecnológicos externos. Conocimientos en Windows 10 / Windows 11: instalación, configuración y soporte.Experiencia sólida en administración de Office 365: Exchange Online, Outlook, Teams, OneDrive y SharePoint (Excluyente). Microsoft Entra: administración de usuarios, grupos y roles. Zoom: gestión de usuarios y licencias. Moodle: soporte funcional y operativo (usuarios, cursos e incidencias). Sistemas de tickets: Jira Service Management o herramientas similares. Ciberseguridad básica: antivirus corporativo, buenas prácticas de seguridad informática.Networking básico: impresoras, WiFi, switches, subredes y nociones de firewall. Conocimientos en Powershell o Python para script.¿Qué vas a hacer?Como Analista Sr. de Soporte IT (O365) deberás encargarte de: Soporte Técnico y Operativo: Administración de Plataformas y Accesos: Operaciones y Gestión de Proveedores: Ciberseguridad y Networking: Operación y Mejora Continua:.¿Cuál es el desafío de la posición?El Analista Sr. de Soporte IT (O365) será responsable de la atención, gestión y resolución end-to-end de incidentes y requerimientos tecnológicos, abarcando a usuarios internos, proveedores externos y plataformas de la compañía. El rol combina tareas de soporte técnico, administración de aplicaciones corporativas y gestión operativa de proveedores, actuando como punto central de coordinación para el seguimiento de servicios, el cumplimiento de los niveles de servicio acordados y el correcto funcionamiento de los entornos tecnológicos, promoviendo un uso eficiente y seguro de los recursos tecnológicos disponibles.¿Con quién trabajarás?Formarás parte del equipo de IT, teniendo contacto directo con diversas áreas como infraestructura, networking, proveedores y usuarios.¿Con qué herramientas trabajarás?Windows 10 y Windows 11, Office 365 (Exchange Online, Outlook, Teams, OneDrive y SharePoint), Moodle, Jira, Hubspot, ticketera.¿Cuándo y dónde trabajarás?Trabajarás en un esquema híbrido, con 3 días de presencialidad y 2 de home office. Deberás contar con disponibilidad para guardias pasivas y activas en caso de que surja alguna incidencia o tarea de implementación. Las oficinas se encuentran en Olivos, Zona Norte.¿Qué ofrecen? Relación de dependencia directa. Esquema Híbrido 1 viernes flex al mes. Día libre de cumpleaños. Prepaga OSDE. Descuentos corporativos en productos y servicios. Convenios para cursos y posgrados. 15 días hábiles de vacaciones (21 de corridos) + receso fin de año por fiestas. Comedor en planta en caso de asistir. Gimnasio/Canchas de Fútbol/Pádel en oficinas que están en Olivos. Charter y estacionamiento en caso de asistir. Puntos para canjear en Le Pain Quotidien, que se encuentra en la oficina.¿De qué fases consta el proceso de selección?Tendrás una primera entrevista con nuestra Recruiter, Carla Carrizo, para conocer tus experiencias laborales e intereses. Luego, participarás de reuniones con nuestros cliente: - una instancia con RRHH para conocer la cultura. - una instancia técnica para conocer los detalles del proyectos. - y por último, una reunión presencial para que puedas conocer el lugar de trabajo.

diaria de equipos informáticos (PCs, impresoras, periféricos, etc.)   Detectar fallas y diagnosticar errores de hardware y software   Resolver incidentes técnicos (de forma remota o presencial según el caso)   Realizar mantenimiento preventivo programado (proactivo)   Instalación, configuración y actualización de sistemas operativos y programas   Soporte y mantenimiento de servidores (configuración, funcionamiento, accesos, etc.)   Apoyar tareas básicas de redes y conectividad (switch, cableado, red interna, etc.)   Implementar herramientas de seguridad IT: antivirus, firewall, antispyware, antispam   Gestionar resguardos de información: backups, copias replicadas, resguardo físico   Instalación y licenciamiento de software según necesidad del cliente   Acompañar al cliente con buen trato, comunicación clara y actitud de servicio  Requisitos:  Sos la persona indicada sí:  Tenes mínimo 6 meses de experiencia comprobable en instalación, configuración y mantenimiento de hardware y software   Conocimiento de periféricos (impresoras, UPS, estaciones de trabajo, etc.)   Conocimiento de servidores   Capacidad de detección de errores y resolución técnica   Contás con estudios afines (sistemas, informática, redes, etc.)   Experiencia o conocimientos en redes (básico o avanzado) será deseable y tenido en cuenta.  Si te gusta el mundo IT, sos de los que disfrutan resolver problemas y el contacto con el cliente, y querés crecer en una empresa en expansión, esta oportunidad es para vos.
